abstract: The rates of graviton emission and absorption by hydrogen atoms have been calculated. The absorption rate is proportional to the number of atoms and the graviton luminosity. Interstellar and intergalactic hydrogen is abundant, and the graviton luminosity of the Sun and typical stars (eV–keV) overlaps with hydrogen’s resonant frequencies, enabling a method to measure the graviton luminosity of different regions. The method relies on the ratio of photon luminosities from interstellar hydrogen, which reveals the helicity difference: 1 for photons vs. 2 for gravitons. This ratio is sensitive to sources of gravitational radiation and provides a way to estimate their intensity, addressing the lack of observational data.
threads: Звёзды испускают невидимые гравитационные волны, и их частота точно совпадает с «любимыми» частотами атомов водорода. Огромные облака этого газа в космосе могут служить пассивными приёмниками гравитации. Раскодировав их свечение, мы смогли бы замерять силу гравитационных толчков в разных уголках Вселенной и построить гравитационную карту.

title: Лунный детектор услышит древние чёрные дыры
abstract: LILA is a laser-interferometric lunar antenna for detecting gravitational waves in the decihertz band. The instrument can register mergers of intermediate-mass black holes (~10^2–10^6 M⊙) out to redshifts z=20–30, directly probing the first generation of massive black holes. Over 4 years of observations, LILA will also detect systems with extreme mass ratios (total mass ~10^4–10^6 M⊙, mass ratio ~10^{-4}–10^{-2}). Events will be captured months to years before merger with measurable residual eccentricity, providing early warning for multi-messenger and multi-band observation campaigns. The high signal-to-noise ratio (≳100) will enable tests of strong-field gravity. The project will complement LIGO/Virgo/KAGRA data on events in the pair-instability mass gap, hierarchical merger candidates, and light IMBHs, extending the upper limit of detected stellar-origin black holes to masses ≳250 M⊙.
threads: На Луне хотят построить детектор, чтобы улавливать гравитационные волны от невидимых чёрных дыр-гигантов. Тишина нашего спутника позволит заглянуть в эпоху, когда Вселенной было всего 200 миллионов лет.

title: Slow Reheating Revives Primordial Black Holes from Phase Transitions
oneliner: A new treatment of gauge invariance and slow reheating shows that primordial black holes can form in supercooled phase transitions of the early universe, despite previous pessimistic conclusions.
description: Researchers have revisited the mechanism of primordial black hole (PBH) formation in slow first-order phase transitions. Previously, it was thought that the gauge dependence of the density contrast suppresses PBH production to negligible levels. However, the authors showed that if reheating after th
abstract: Large curvature perturbations generated during slow first-order phase transitions were considered a promising source of primordial black holes. However, recent work showed that the mechanism is ruled out if density contrast and formation threshold are computed in the same gauge. This paper demonstrates that such a scenario remains viable: after a supercooled transition, reheating can be slow enough for the universe to enter an early matter-dominated era. During this period, even small density perturbations grow and collapse into primordial black holes. The result revives a broad class of cosmological models with phase transitions, relevant for explaining dark matter and gravitational wave signals.
threads: Вселенная готовит чёрные дыры в су-виде: медленно и без суеты. После фазового перехода она не взрывается, а тлеет, давая крохотным неоднородностям время для роста. То, что казалось шёпотом, становится грохотом коллапса. Так рождаются астероидные чёрные дыры — возможно, та самая тёмная материя. Рецепт зашифрован в гравитационных волнах.

title: Polarization Echo: Light Catches the Gravitational Ringdown of a Black Hole
oneliner: Scientists have shown that oscillations in the polarization angle of photons near a merging black hole directly reflect the damped gravitational-wave signal of its ringdown.
description: In a new study, a covariant approach is developed to describe the evolution of light polarization in dynamic curved spacetime. Numerical simulations based on Kerr perturbation theory show that the photon polarization angle undergoes damped oscillations that exactly match the quasinormal modes of the
abstract: The work develops a covariant perturbative formalism for polarized photon propagation in arbitrary curved spacetimes. A compact expression for the polarization angle (PA) swing during the ringdown phase of a Kerr black hole is derived, explicitly revealing temporal synchronization with quasinormal modes. The result is confirmed by dynamical ray-tracing computations across a wide range of photon trajectories. Photons passing through the strong-field region exhibit achromatic damped PA oscillations with amplitudes up to ~10°, the phase set by the angular structure of the mode. This effect imprints distinctive signatures in spatially resolved autocorrelations and opens a novel polarimetric window for observing black hole mergers and their ringdown.
threads: Удар космического колокола: когда чёрные дыры сливаются, пространство звенит, а свет вокруг начинает дрожать в такт. Поляризация фотонов копирует ритм гравитационного рингдауна, словно сейсмограф. Ахроматический поворот на ~10° — это подпись чистой геометрии. Новые поляриметры позволят «читать» рождение чёрных дыр по трепету света.

title: Stability and Quasinormal Modes of Analog Black-White Holes in Superconducting Circuits
oneliner: Perturbations around solitons in superconducting parametric amplifiers decay through a characteristic ringdown — quasinormal modes — confirming the system's stability.
description: The stability of analog event horizons in circuits based on SNAIL superconducting elements is theoretically investigated. Using supersymmetric quantum mechanics, the absence of growing modes is proven, and a combination of WKB approximation and numerical shooting method allowed computation of quasin
abstract: The dynamics of a traveling wave in a travelling-wave parametric amplifier (TWPA) based on SNAIL elements is considered, described by the Korteweg–de Vries equation or the modified KdV in the continuous limit. The soliton solution spatially modulates the effective speed of the probe field, realizing an analogue event horizon. A master equation for the weak probe field is obtained, where the background soliton plays the role of a potential. Using methods of supersymmetric quantum mechanics, the absence of normalizable negative modes is shown. For the first time, quasinormal modes of an analogue black-white hole are investigated semi-analytically and numerically; based on the computed frequencies, the timescale for the activation of nonlinear dispersion is established, and the excitation of a ringing mode is demonstrated.
threads: У аналоговых чёрных дыр на сверхпроводящих чипах обнаружили особый «звон» — он не колеблется, а сразу затухает, подобно чаше, погружённой в мёд. Это чисто диссипативные квазинормальные моды. Такой диссонанс с настоящими чёрными дырами сулит прорыв в лабораторной проверке эффекта Хокинга и, возможно, создание стабильных кротовых нор.

title: Post-Newtonian Gravitational Collapse: How Rotation Destroys Quantum Superposition
oneliner: Taking into account gravitomagnetic effects in linearized gravity leads to a new decoherence mechanism acting on rotational degrees of freedom, opening the way to experimental verification in optomechanics and astrophysics.
description: Scientists have extended the famous Diósi–Penrose wave function collapse model by incorporating post-Newtonian corrections from linearized general relativity. Starting from gravitoelectromagnetism, they derived a generalized master equation that, in addition to standard positional decoherence, conta
abstract: A general collapse mechanism tied to gravity is proposed, grounded in linearized gravity. From the weak-field limit of general relativity, gravitoelectromagnetism yields an effective coupling between the gravitoelectric potential and mass density, as well as between the gravitomagnetic vector potential and mass current. Within a hybrid (classical-quantum) framework, these couplings lead to a master equation whose non-unitary part is determined by the mass distribution and currents. Considering only the gravitoelectric potential reproduces the Diósi–Penrose collapse model, acting on positional degrees of freedom. Incorporating the gravitomagnetic potential introduces additional collapse mechanisms for rotational degrees of freedom and mixed mass-rotation contributions.
threads: Пульсары — космические квантовые лаборатории: их вращение на 15% скорости света рождает гравитомагнитный шум, убивающий квантовые суперпозиции. Гравитация, словно токарный станок, срезает неопределённость с вращающихся масс. Новый механизм декогеренции прокладывает путь к проверке квантовой гравитации — мы, возможно, увидим, как рождается классический мир.

title: Charge and Gravity: A New Parameter κ and the Unexplored Frontier of the Equivalence Principle
oneliner: A phenomenological parameter κ is proposed, quantifying a potential linear relationship between electric charge and gravitational acceleration, and a first constraint is derived from existing experiments.
description: The paper introduces the parameter κ = Δa/g / Δ(q/m), which characterizes deviations from the weak equivalence principle (WEP) for electrically charged bodies. Analysis of high-precision experimental data yields an upper limit |κ| < 2.1×10⁻⁴ kg/C, which is 11 orders of magnitude weaker than constrai
abstract: A phenomenological parameter κ = (Δa/g) / Δ(q/m) is introduced to quantitatively assess a linear relation between electric charge and gravitational acceleration. A joint analysis of precision equivalence principle experiments yields a limit |κ| < 2.1×10⁻⁴ kg/C at 95% confidence — roughly 11 orders of magnitude weaker than constraints on composition-dependent effects. It is shown that κ falls into a region untested by Standard Model extensions and the THεμ formalism. Effective field theory analysis demonstrates suppression of dimension-six curvature–electromagnetic coupling operators due to the extremely small curvature of Earth’s spacetime (G_N ρ_⊕ ∼ 10⁻⁵⁵ GeV²), rendering them phenomenologically negligible. Measuring κ at achievable levels would point not to minimal geometric couplings but to physics beyond minimal gravitational EFT, e.g., light scalar fields in Einstein–Maxwell–dilaton theory. The Schiff–Barnhill effect is examined as the main systematic background, and a method to separate it is shown. An experimental strategy with maximal charge-to-mass contrast is proposed to turn this axis into a targeted probe of new physics.
threads: Земные тесты гравитации добились немыслимой точности, но всегда избегали электрического заряда — словно скрипач, веками игравший на трёх струнах, боясь коснуться четвёртой. Параметр κ заставляет взять этот последний аккорд. Если струна зазвучит, мы уловим эхо неоткрытых сил: от дилатонов теории струн до тёмных фотонов. Впервые у принципа эквивалентности прорезался электрический голос.

title: Древний джет черной дыры оставил гамма-след в центре Галактики
abstract: A scenario is proposed for the origin of the Galactic Center gamma-ray excess (GCE), linking it to past activity of SgrA*. According to the model, part of the GCE is a fossil hadronic imprint of the outflow that formed the Fermi and eROSITA bubbles. A precessing parabolic Blandford-Znajek jet from a tilted magnetically arrested disk is considered, active around 7.5 million years ago and declined around 2.6 million years ago. The jet, while driving the bubble expansion, injected high-energy protons. Diffusion calculation in a two-zone model and gamma-ray emission show that for a spin a*=0.9, the jet contribution alone yields an unavoidable hadronic background at the level of a few to ~10% of the observed GCE surface brightness within ten degrees from the center. Magnetic confinement and transparency conditions are satisfied. This result introduces a previously unaccounted component, important for constructing a complete picture of the GCE.
threads: В центре Млечного Пути найден призрак древней вспышки. Наша сверхмассивная черная дыра миллионы лет назад «чихнула» мощным джетом, и эхо этого события до сих пор подсвечивает гамма-лучами. Теперь модели загадочного галактического свечения станут точнее, а тайна темного вещества — чуть ближе к разгадке.

title: Black Holes: Why Observations Cannot Confirm Their Existence
oneliner: Gravitational waves and shadows of compact objects align with theory but do not prove the existence of black holes, as any ultracompact object without a horizon can mimic their signatures.
description: Modern astrophysical observations—from detecting gravitational waves to capturing shadow images—are often touted as direct proof of black holes. However, a closer look reveals that these data only confirm general relativity's predictions for Kerr metrics but do not rule out alternative models of hor
abstract: General relativity has passed many successful tests. Recent results from the LIGO-Virgo-KAGRA, Event Horizon Telescope, and GRAVITY collaborations are often taken as proof that black holes exist, but they actually only show the presence of candidate objects. The data agree impressively with predictions for Kerr black holes, but this only excludes certain alternative models of compact objects—it doesn't provide a final proof. More fundamentally, general relativity imposes principled limits on what we can observe: no observational data can ever confirm the existence of black holes. Thus, observational cosmology hits an epistemological limit set by the theory itself.
threads: Бездна носит маску бездны. Гравитационные волны, тени, танец звёзд — каждая деталь кричит о чёрной дыре. Но стоит объекту оказаться на волос шире горизонта, и разница растворяется. Природа надела настолько совершенный покров, что истина ускользает. Возможно, мы никогда не сорвём его, но продолжим искать швы — и в этом поиске нащупаем квантовую гравитацию.

title: Gravity’s Gentle Touch Erases Quantum ‘Magic’
abstract: Wave function collapse models propose that gravitational effects cause instability in mass distribution superpositions, leading to state reduction. In this work, the quantum Boltzmann equation is used to analyze a fermion in a spatial superposition while emitting gravitons. A quantitative measure is introduced, linking superposition stability to spatial separation, particle mass, and the gravitational coupling constant. From the analysis of the collision term of the equation, the decoherence rate is derived, demonstrating dependence on these parameters. The results provide a detailed framework for describing gravitationally induced decoherence, bridging quantum field theory and collapse models. Implications for experimental tests of gravity-induced collapse and for dissipative continuous spontaneous localization models are discussed.
threads: A particle can be in two places at once—until gravity steps in. Even the gentlest spacetime ripples, called gravitational waves, make ghostly states vanish. The heavier the object, the faster the blur fades. Tests with tiny mirrors may soon solve why our world looks solid.

title: Gravitational Radio Forest: How Quantum Spectroscopy of Hydrogen Reveals Dark Matter
oneliner: Interstellar hydrogen in ionized gas regions acts as a quantum sensor, splitting radio lines under the tidal forces of primordial black holes and creating a unique spectral pattern.
description: Astrophysicists have proposed a new method for searching for dark matter in the form of asteroid-mass primordial black holes. Using hydrogen in HII regions as a quantum detector of spacetime curvature, they showed that tidal forces from these objects split the 2P₃/₂ level, turning a single absorptio
abstract: A new gravitational signal is proposed for detecting primordial black holes as a component of dark matter, using interstellar hydrogen as a quantum sensor of spacetime curvature. In H II regions, the tidal Riemann tensor from an asteroid-mass black hole symmetrically splits the 2P3/2 level in bound hydrogen atoms. This relativistic effect turns a single absorption line at 9.9 GHz into a gravitational radio-frequency forest about 2 GHz wide. Under active hydrogen accretion, the emission measure is proportional to the square of the density within the Bondi radius, further enhancing the absorption spectrum. The discovered feature provides a specific high-contrast target for future radio surveys aimed at constraining populations of primordial black holes in the dark matter sector.
threads: 9,9 ГГц — тихая песнь межзвёздного водорода. Пролетающая первичная чёрная дыра расщепляет её на два голоса: гравитационные приливы раздваивают тон. Миллиарды таких дыр сплетают спектральный радио-лес, где каждый ствол отбрасывает двойную тень. Этот лес — детектор тёмной материи. Мы настраиваем слух.

title: When Weak Fields Aren't Weak: Post-Newtonian Theory and the Dark Matter Puzzle
oneliner: The post-Newtonian approximation can break down in many-body systems, offering a nonlocal solution to the dark matter problem.
description: In an essay for the Gravity Research Foundation 2026, the authors demonstrate that the post-Newtonian expansion of general relativity loses reliability in systems with many degrees of freedom and inhomogeneous curvature. The key result is the introduction of a diagnostic parameter based on nonlocal
abstract: Post-Newtonian theory is usually seen as a trustworthy effective expansion of general relativity when fields are weak and motion is slow. But that’s not always true: in relativistic many-body dynamics, the absence of global conserved charges and non-integrability can make the system highly sensitive to angular momentum exchange via non-uniform curvature, rendering naive power counting in the effective expansion useless. Drawing on effective field theory principles, a clear breakdown criterion is derived that pinpoints when post-Newtonian approximations get shaky, even with small local potentials and speeds. This provides a controlled framework for determining mass in weak fields—crucial for tackling dark matter in astrophysics and cosmology.
threads: Гравитация, которую всегда считали слабой, в масштабах галактик даёт сбой. Как тихий шёпот толпы превращается в оглушительный рёв, так угловой момент миллиардов звёзд создаёт иллюзию тёмной материи. Если расчёты верны, обзоры LSST и Euclid скоро покажут, что часть скрытой массы — коллективное гравитационное эхо.

title: The Big Rip Won't Happen Tomorrow: Constraints from Solar System Dynamics
oneliner: Even if dark energy suddenly becomes phantom, planetary motion data guarantees that we have at least 30 years before the universe's demise.
description: Modern cosmology does not rule out a model of phantom dark energy with an equation of state parameter w < –1, leading to a Big Rip singularity in finite time. While cosmological observations cannot constrain a sudden increase in the phantom component on decadal timescales, the dynamics of Solar Syst
abstract: Phantom dark energy models (with equation of state w < –1) predict a 'Big Rip' singularity at a finite future. For constant w close to –1, the rip is postponed on the scale of Hubble time, but if w quickly decreases or there is an additional phantom component with density much lower than the background and w ≪ –1, the rip can occur after a time much shorter than the Hubble time. Cosmological observations, relying on light emitted billions of years ago, cannot exclude such a scenario for the near future. The dynamics of Solar System bodies, on the contrary, is sensitive to phantom energy on the scale of decades. Analysis of planetary motion gives a lower bound: time until rip t_rip – t_0 > 30 years. Although this limit is small, future more precise measurements can improve it. Remarkably, the first signs of an impending rip would manifest exactly in Solar System data, not in cosmological observations.
threads: Даже если тёмная энергия решила устроить Большой разрыв, планеты предупредят нас за 30 лет. Их орбиты — словно натянутая паутина: малейшее изменение натяжения — сигнал тревоги. Лазеры и радиолучи непрерывно прощупывают эту паутину, и пока она спокойна. Так мы превратили Солнечную систему в первый датчик космической погоды.

title: Before the Big Bang: Wormholes at the Dawn of the Universe
oneliner: Euclidean wormholes expand the landscape of initial conditions for the Universe, offering a dynamical explanation for the birth of the inflationary cosmos.
description: New research reveals that Euclidean wormholes can act as saddle points of the gravitational path integral, shaping the initial wave function of the Universe. Unlike the classic Hartle-Hawking proposal, this work considers topologically non-trivial geometries with asymptotically anti-de Sitter bounda
abstract: Euclidean wormholes are proposed as a contribution to the initial quantum state of the Universe. Compared to the Hartle-Hawking no-boundary approach, they show conceptual kinship but make a genuine breakthrough: while preserving the importance of Euclidean saddles for encoding the properties of cosmological wave functions, wormholes expand the class of regular saddles relevant for inflationary universes and solve problems that limit the no-boundary model. The main result is an enriched semiclassical landscape of initial conditions, physically rich and consistent with holographic principles. This opens the way to constructing early Universe models in UV-complete theories of quantum gravity.
threads: Квантовое рождение Вселенной — это не плавное начало, а узкое горлышко. Евклидовы кротовые норы, похожие на винные бокалы, оказались идеальными воронками для запуска инфляции. Это меняет взгляд на тонкую настройку космоса и, возможно, оставляет отпечатки в реликтовом излучении. В будущем телескопы помогут отличить сценарии рождения.

title: Колеблющаяся граница Вселенной: неожиданный фазовый сдвиг
abstract: The Hartle-Hawking wave function in AdS space is considered with open spatial slices requiring an additional boundary. Two versions are constructed: a fully gravitational one, where the boundary configuration is integrated over, and a partially frozen one, where it is fixed (as in AdS/CFT). Within the fully gravitational setup, AdS3 Einstein gravity and AdS2 Jackiw-Teitelboim theory are explicitly analyzed. The one-loop correction to the stat sum of a hyperbolic ball in D-dimensional Einstein-AdS gravity, which gives the leading contribution to the norm of the wave function, yields, for a fluctuating boundary, a nontrivial phase of the form (∓ i)^{D+1}, similar to that arising for a sphere in dS gravity. In contrast, the partially frozen stat sum with fixed boundary remains real and positive. Motivated by this comparison, a partially frozen dS sphere with fixed metric on the equator is also considered, and it is found that its one-loop phase cancels nontrivially. The results indicate that the phase problem is determined by whether the gravitational path integral is fully dynamical or partially frozen.
threads: Барабан без обода — так Стивен Хокинг представлял рождение Вселенной. В новой работе физики добавили дрожащий «обод» и обнаружили: всё мироздание получает скрытый фазовый сдвиг. Этот эффект может определять, какие вселенные более вероятны.

title: Why Wormholes Are Impossible Without Exotic Matter: A New No-Go Theorem
oneliner: Matter-vacuum interplay can't rescue wormholes from breaking energy conditions—geometry remains unyielding.
description: New research proves that even with an unusually tight coupling between matter and a dynamic vacuum, traversable wormholes require exotic matter that violates the null energy condition. Analysis of static, spherically symmetric solutions with zero tidal forces shows that no interaction can shield the
abstract: Traversable topological bridges (wormholes) typically demand exotic matter that violates the null energy condition (NEC). The inquiry is whether matter-vacuum coupling can bypass this requirement. For static, zero-tidal-force setups, a strict no-go theorem emerges: such coupling cannot replace NEC violation. The geometric flaring-out condition is shown to be incompatible with sources that satisfy the NEC, regardless of the coupling constant Q or equation of state. Crucially, the vacuum does not shield the throat; instead, interaction gradients mathematically obstruct the needed geometry. This reveals a built-in causality shield in the field equations: the vacuum acts not as a go-between for topological shortcuts, but as a regulator that reinforces classical energy constraints.
threads: Геометрия пространства-времени выставляет счёт за любое чудо. Даже если заставить тёмную энергию работать на кротовую нору, счётчик покажет отрицательное давление — и Вселенная откажется платить. Словно судья, разоблачающий подлог, уравнения Эйнштейна отбрасывают иллюзорные подпорки и требуют прямого нарушения энергетических условий. Приговор пока окончателен, но квантовая кассация непредсказуема.

title: Reflecting Gravitons: The Graviton Laser and the Gertsenshtein Effect
oneliner: Scientists have proposed using graviton-to-photon conversion in a magnetic field to create a graviton laser.
description: In the quest to amplify gravitational waves, physicists have turned to the idea of a graviton laser. The main hurdle—the lack of natural mirrors for gravitons—is overcome using the Gertsenshtein effect: the mutual conversion of gravitons and photons in a strong magnetic field. Calculations show that
abstract: The feasibility of a laboratory graviton laser is explored. The main hurdle is the lack of reflectors for gravitons. A proposed solution leverages the Gertsenshtein effect: converting gravitons into photons in an external magnetic field. The setup involves turning gravitons into photons, reflecting them with standard mirrors, and converting them back into gravitons. An identical arrangement on the other side allows arbitrary extension of the effective path length through the amplifying medium. Various gravitating systems can serve as the active medium (three examples are given). This approach demonstrates for the first time the fundamental feasibility of a graviton laser under terrestrial conditions.
threads: От слияния чёрных дыр летят 10⁷⁸ гравитонов — больше, чем атомов в Солнечной системе. Они проходят сквозь всё, как призраки. Но физики нашли квантовый переводчик: сильное магнитное поле на мгновение превращает гравитон в фотон, а фотон можно отразить. Так рождается идея гравитонного лазера — инструмента, способного усилить само пространство-время.

title: Long-Throat Wormholes: How to Distinguish Them from Black Holes by Their Images
oneliner: Images of accreting wormholes with adjustable throat length show striking differences from black holes due to the dominance of the Doppler effect over gravitational redshift.
description: Scientists studied the observational signatures of a family of static, spherically symmetric wormholes with an arbitrary throat profile. Through numerical simulations, they obtained the shadow and throat silhouette radii, as well as images of a thin accretion disk for various model parameters. They
abstract: Observational signatures — shadow, throat silhouette, and thin accretion disk image — have been studied for a family of static, spherically symmetric wormholes with an arbitrary throat profile. Expressions for the shadow radius, throat silhouette radius, and photon energy shift were derived in the general static spherically symmetric case. The resulting formulas were applied to a specific metric with three free parameters: throat radius a, throat length λ, and parameter u0 controlling the depth of the gravitational well. The shadow and silhouette radii were computed numerically as functions of the parameters, accretion disk images were generated for three representative parameter sets, and comparisons were made with the Schwarzschild black hole. It is shown that there exist parameter combinations for which the wormhole's shadow and throat silhouette coincide with those of a black hole of the same mass. Nevertheless, the accretion disk images are fundamentally different: in the wormhole, the Doppler effect dominates over gravitational redshift, making its image noticeably brighter.
threads: Два объекта, одна тень. Чёрная дыра — гравитационный капкан. Кротовая нора — тоннель, где пространство-время изогнуто, словно горлышко гитары. Их выдаёт аккреционный диск: у чёрной дыры фотоны краснеют и тускнеют, у кротовой норы — взлетают до фиолетовых частот. Эффект Доплера перекрикивает гравитацию: 1.45 против 0.74. Возможно, в сердце Стрельца A* прячется не монстр, а портал.

title: Гравитационные волны: новый слушатель на Южном полюсе
abstract: Atom interferometry is a promising method for detecting gravitational waves in the decihertz frequency band, complementing existing laser detectors. The South Pole offers unique advantages: exceptionally low seismic noise, developed infrastructure for large-scale science projects, and a geographic position that improves the localization of gravitational wave sources through global triangulation. We discuss the scientific rationale and practical considerations for deploying a long-baseline atom interferometer at the South Pole. Such an instrument could expand the worldwide detector network and enable high-precision tests of fundamental physics.
threads: Пока LIGO слушает визг сталкивающихся чёрных дыр, антарктический детектор на атомах уловит их басовитый гул — и укажет точное место на небе.

title: Река как зеркало Вселенной
abstract: In the shallow-water approximation, the cross-sectional profiles of laboratory rivers are described by a differential equation that formally matches the Friedmann cosmological equation for an anti-de Sitter universe. This analogy yields an unexpected Lagrangian for the cross-sectional profile. Extremizing the corresponding action means extremizing the frictional force on the riverbed and the rate of energy dissipation. A second-variation analysis reveals that this extremum is a maximum. Thus, the river adopts a shape where friction and energy dissipation are maximized, pointing to a deep variational principle that links hydrodynamics and cosmology.
threads: Форма речного русла подчиняется космическому уравнению! Оказывается, профиль дна реки описывается тем же законом, что и эволюция Вселенной с отрицательной кривизной. Это значит, что вода течет так, чтобы трение было максимальным. Возможно, такой подход поможет проектировать более эффективные каналы или предсказывать разливы.

title: Магия перевода: от чёрных дыр к электричеству
abstract: Within the Kerr-Schild double copy, static spherically symmetric black hole solutions of general relativity map to purely electric solutions of Maxwell’s theory in flat spacetime. It is shown that for these configurations, the Smarr thermodynamic formula is structurally identical to Gauss’s law in the electromagnetic copy. When extending to asymptotically anti-de Sitter spaces, it is proven that the thermodynamic pressure-volume term naturally arises from the gauge subtraction of the background. This connection points to a nontrivial unity of the classical double copy and black hole thermodynamics.
threads: Оказывается, законы чёрных дыр можно переписать электрическим языком — как если бы холодильник готовил по рецепту микроволновки. Это не трюк, а новый взгляд на термодинамику пространства-времени, приближающий нас к единой теории.

title: Инфляция и тёмная энергия: одна космическая пружина?
abstract: In a maximally symmetric spacetime, an analysis of the regularized vacuum energy–momentum tensor for scalar fields was carried out. Using the Friedmann equation, we assessed the ability of such fields to cause early inflation or the current acceleration of the Universe. It was found that a conformally coupled field with a mass on the order of ten Planck masses (∼10 M_pl) can be a candidate for both the inflaton and dark energy. This result suggests that both cosmological components have a common quantum origin. Meanwhile, a minimally coupled scalar field is ruled out: it cannot provide either inflation or the observed acceleration, regardless of the chosen mass.
threads: Одна и та же квантовая «пружина» могла растянуть Вселенную в первые мгновения и заставляет галактики разбегаться сейчас. Инфляция и тёмная энергия, возможно, близнецы, рождённые гравитацией и особым полем.

title: Почему чёрная дыра не сжигает то, что падает
abstract: The AMPS firewall argument relies on the approximate independence of early radiation, late Hawking modes, and interior partners. In diffeomorphism-invariant quantum gravity, gravitational dressing and asymptotic symmetries prevent the factorization of observables. Our analysis reveals this obstruction in terms of operator algebras. Modular theory and half-sided modular inclusions along null directions show that, in a given charge sector at infinity, the algebra of interior modes does not commute with the radiation algebra but is embedded in it as a non-commuting subalgebra. Thus, the independence assumption needed for the AMPS paradox is false, and monogamy is not invoked. Unitary evaporation and a smooth horizon are compatible in asymptotically flat quantum gravity without invoking entanglement islands or other modifications.
threads: Крохотная чёрная дыра-невидимка. Она излучает, худеет и однажды исчезает, унося тайны. Физики спорили: на её краю должен полыхать файрвол — стена огня. Новая работа опровергает: внутренности и излучение связаны как страницы одной книги. Гравитация сама «сшивает» реальность, обходя парадокс.

title: Gravitons Under Pressure: How Black Holes Create Quantum-Squeezed Radiation
oneliner: Superradiant axion clouds around spinning black holes can generate multimode squeezed states of gravitons with a macroscopic number of quanta, paving the way to detecting the quantum nature of gravity.
description: Quantum gravity remains elusive due to effects suppressed by the Planck scale. Recently, an astrophysical mechanism was proposed that harnesses superradiance of axion clouds around spinning black holes to generate strongly squeezed graviton states containing up to 10⁷ correlated particles. These sta
abstract: Direct detection of individual gravitons has long been considered impossible due to suppression by the Planck scale. The work proposes a mechanism that circumvents this limitation: superradiant clouds of axion-like particles around spinning black holes generate multimode squeezed states of gravitons with quantum numbers of 10^6–10^7. These states feature polarization correlations and quantum noise signatures that could be registered by future gravitational-wave interferometers. Detection of such signals would be direct evidence for the quantum nature of gravity; a null result would constrain the lifetime of axion clouds. The proposed approach also provides a test of general relativity as an effective field theory.
threads: Чёрная дыра — квантовая прялка. Аксионное облако — кудель тёмной материи, а гравитация — нелинейное веретено. Оно сплетает пары запутанных гравитонов, до 10⁷ за один акт. Их поляризация рисует чёткий орнамент: |RL⟩+|LR⟩ — гравитационный аналог корреляций Эйнштейна. Детекторы будущего уловят этот узор в шуме Вселенной, и человечество впервые прикоснётся к квантовой изнанке мироздания.

title: Чёрные дыры: кванты не сломают небесную цензуру
abstract: Penrose introduced the trapped surface—a spacelike hypersurface where both future-directed null normal vectors have negative expansion. When the null convergence condition holds (null convergence condition), this leads to null geodesic incompleteness, i.e., a singularity. A trapped surface always lies inside an event horizon, supporting the weak cosmic censorship hypothesis. In semiclassical gravity, where quantum effects can violate the null convergence condition, these guarantees are lost. The generalization is the 'sufficiently trapped surface,' which relaxes the energy requirements to be compatible with quantum fields. This concept restores the key role in singularity and area theorems, and continues to support the cosmic censorship hypothesis.
threads: Свет, попавший в особую зону чёрной дыры, навсегда обречён падать внутрь — как вода в сливном отверстии. Физики выяснили, что даже квантовая «рябь» не способна разрушить эту ловушку. Сердце чёрной дыры остаётся вечной тайной.

title: The Universe Devourer: How World Mergers Explain Dark Energy Without a Cosmological Constant
oneliner: A late-time cosmological model where our Universe gobbles up 'baby universes', expands exponentially without Λ, and predicts w(z) < –1 at high redshifts.
description: Seeking to explain the accelerated expansion of the universe and recent DESI data on dark energy evolution, the authors propose a model where the cosmological constant is replaced by the absorption of other universes. The key parameter—the merger coupling constant g—is determined from a local measur
abstract: We consider a cosmological model where our Universe, in its later evolutionary stages, absorbs 'daughter' universes. This process accounts for the observed exponential expansion without the need for a cosmological constant. The dark energy equation of state acquires a dependence on redshift: the parameter w(z) becomes a function of z. At sufficiently high z, w(z) falls below −1, indicating a 'phantom' nature. The model offers a natural dynamical alternative to static dark energy and can be tested by astronomical observations. It also predicts that the dark energy density changed over time, distinguishing it from the standard ΛCDM model.
threads: Вселенная расширяется с ускорением, но причина может быть не в таинственной тёмной энергии, а в том, что она пожирает другие вселенные. Космический каннибализм: младенческие миры, рождающиеся из квантовой пены, сливаются с нашей, увеличивая её объём. Константа «аппетита» g, возможно, задана квантовой гравитацией. Это объясняет крошечную плотность тёмной энергии и рисует будущее, где мы — часть мультивселенной-экосистемы.

title: Birth of Primordial Black Holes from Tensor Perturbations during Phase Transitions
oneliner: First-order tensor perturbations, arising from bubble collisions during phase transitions and domain wall annihilations, induce scalar inhomogeneities at second order in perturbation theory, which can collapse into primordial black holes.
description: A gauge-invariant mechanism is proposed for the formation of primordial black holes (PBHs) via tensor-induced density fluctuations during first-order cosmological phase transitions and domain wall decay. Gravitational waves from these processes create large curvature perturbations at second order, w
threads: В первые мгновения после Большого взрыва Вселенная варилась, как гигантский котёл, меняя фазы. Каждый такой переход рассылал гравитационные волны — барабанную дробь по ткани пространства-времени. Эти волны, подобно звуку, рисующему узоры на песке, сами создавали сгущения, коллапсирующие в чёрные дыры. Возможно, та самая тёмная материя — это невидимые чёрные дыры, рождённые биением космических барабанов. Будущие гравитационно-волновые обсерватории услышат эту мелодию.

title: Inflation in a Cyclic Universe: The Recurring Birth of Structure
oneliner: Cosmological inflation may not be a one-off event but a recurring phase after each contraction-expansion cycle.
description: The paper proposes a model that unites cyclic cosmology and the inflationary paradigm. Two scalar fields govern the evolution of the universe: one handles the cycles of contraction and expansion, the other triggers inflation after each bounce. This approach resolves the initial singularity problem a
abstract: Inflationary cosmology accounts for the uniformity and large-scale structure of the universe via a brief epoch of accelerated expansion. Cyclic models describe repeated phases of contraction and expansion, generating primordial perturbations through alternative mechanisms and removing the initial singularity. Typically these paradigms are contrasted. This work demonstrates their compatibility in a scenario with two scalar fields: one governs the cyclic evolution, the other triggers inflation after each cosmological bounce. Thus, inflation may not be a singular event, but a recurring signature of a cyclic universe.
threads: Вселенная не взорвалась однажды — она дышит, как кузнечные мехи. Сжатие до планковских размеров и отскок запускают инфляцию, словно впрыск кислорода в горн. Два скалярных поля — рукоять и клапан — куют из пепла новый космос, а гравитационные волны от прошлых циклов, быть может, уже дрожат в поляризации реликтового фона.

title: Brighter than a shadow: modeling radiation from an Ellis-Bronnikov wormhole and its resemblance to a black hole
oneliner: A comparison of shadows from an Ellis-Bronnikov wormhole and a Schwarzschild black hole shows the wormhole is brighter due to the lack of an event horizon, but both match observations by the Event Horizon Telescope.
description: Researchers simulated images of an Ellis-Bronnikov wormhole and a Schwarzschild black hole using general relativity and radiative transfer. The accretion flow was assumed spherically symmetric, with synchrotron emission. The wormhole's shadow and photon ring turned out brighter because radiation arr
abstract: Using general relativistic radiation transfer (GRRT) simulations, differences in the observational signatures of an Ellis-Bronnikov wormhole and a Schwarzschild black hole were studied. A spherically symmetric steady accretion flow with synchrotron radiation was assumed. In both cases, images contain a central shadow and a bright photon ring. The wormhole's shadow and ring were found to be significantly brighter, explained by the lack of an event horizon: radiation from matter on the far side of the throat contributes additional observed intensity. Comparison with Event Horizon Telescope (EHT) data for M87* shows that both objects are in reasonable agreement with current observations.
threads: В 2019-м мы впервые разглядели «тень» чёрной дыры. А если это кротовая нора? Моделирование показало: без горизонта событий её фотонное кольцо ярче — свечение просачивается сквозь горловину, как сквозь призрачную ткань. Будущие интерферометры поймают этот фантомный блеск, и тогда мосты сквозь пространство-время станут объектами наблюдений, а не фантастики.

title: Cosmic Chaos: What the Pincus-Lyapunov Diagram Reveals About Fast Radio Bursts
oneliner: Fast radio bursts prove unique on the stochasticity–chaos spectrum, unlike either magnetar flares or earthquakes.
description: To uncover the nature of millisecond cosmic radio bursts (FRBs), astrophysicists compared their statistical properties with other transient phenomena — from pulsar glitches to solar flares and earthquakes. Applying methods from nonlinear dynamics (Pincus index and Lyapunov exponent), they built a ph
threads: FRB 20240114A — это нейтронная звезда, генерирующая до 729 радиовсплесков в час. На диаграмме Пинкуса–Ляпунова её ритм выглядит как белый шум без памяти (PI=0.9, LE=0.1). Это не стройные пульсации пульсара и не хаос тектонических плит, а пена случайных разрядов. Кажется, мы слышим, как турбулентная магнитосфера распадается на множество голосов, каждый со своим непредсказуемым щелчком.

title: The Duality Redshift: How Photons Morph into Dark Matter and Resolve the Hubble Tension
oneliner: Adding a non-metric redshift component, caused by photon energy converting into effective mass, reconciles supernova data with Planck cosmology and eases the Hubble tension.
description: The Hubble tension is one of the thorniest contradictions in modern cosmology: the expansion rate of the universe measured from the cosmic microwave background and from supernovae differs by 5 sigma. This paper proposes a hybrid model where the observed redshift is the sum of standard metric expansi
abstract: An operational model of redshift duality is tested, where the observed shift includes a standard metric component and an additional quantum contribution from photon energy conversion to effective mass, dependent on path and frequency. Analysis of the Pantheon+SH0ES data compilation shows that the metric Hubble constant H_Λ recovers to a value consistent with the baseline Planck result (67.4 km/s/Mpc) within ≲0.33σ. Redshift binning demonstrates that in standard flat ΛCDM, an apparent Hubble parameter drift emerges, while the hybrid model restores its constancy. Recalculated cosmological quantities point to the possibility of smoothing out anomalies associated with galaxies at large redshifts. The results suggest that further study of redshift duality in observational cosmology is warranted, while maintaining consistency with flat ΛCDM anchored on Planck.
threads: Космологическая загадка: два измерения возраста Вселенной не сходятся. Свет стареет не только от расширения — часть его энергии незаметно превращается в тёмную материю, как река, питающая подземные воды. Возможно, именно так утекают 5% энергии фотонов. Лазерные эксперименты в космосе проверят эту гипотезу. Тихий шёпот света хранит тайну невидимого мира.

title: The Kilometer Barrier: Why Tidal Forces Leave Only Large Fragments from Asteroids
oneliner: Even the loosest planetesimals near white dwarfs can’t be ground directly into dust—cohesion sets a minimum fragment size of around 0.1–1 km.
description: New research shows that tidal disruption of asteroids and comets near white dwarfs doesn’t immediately grind them into fine dust. Accounting for internal strength from Van der Waals forces creates a 'kilometer barrier'—the maximum fragment size is hundreds of meters to a kilometer, regardless of the
threads: Крошечные силы Ван-дер-Ваальса, скрепляющие песчинки, сталкиваются с титанической гравитацией умирающей звезды — и побеждают. Астероид разрывается, но осколки остаются размером с небоскрёб: это километровый барьер. Словно коралловый риф, он ломается на массивные блоки, а не рассыпается икринками. Так рождаются пылевые диски у белых карликов, предвещая финал нашей планетной системы.

title: The Universe as a Quantum Post-Selection: Acceleration Without Dark Energy
oneliner: Quantum post-selection explains cosmic acceleration without invoking new fields or vacuum energy.
description: This article presents an alternative explanation for the accelerating expansion of the Universe, one rooted in quantum post-selection: the idea of specifying not just an initial but also a final state of the cosmic wave function. Working in a minisuperspace model of a radiation-dominated flat univer
abstract: A new mechanism for the accelerated expansion of the universe is proposed, requiring neither a cosmological constant nor extra fields. The acceleration emerges as a quantum effect from imposing two boundary conditions on the wave function of the universe—an initial semiclassical state (radiation trajectory) and a final state (a normalizable Chern–Simons soliton) within quantum cosmology with connection variables and unimodular time. In this two-boundary amplitude, the peak shifts away from the radiation trajectory into an accelerating regime, even though the forward Hamiltonian implies Λ=0. A classical fit would need an effective component with w≈-1 near the transition and evolving to w<-1 (phantom behavior). Hence, the acceleration is more naturally interpreted as a manifestation of quantum boundary conditions rather than a local classical source. The purity of the final state and potential observational signatures are also discussed.
threads: Ускоряется ли Вселенная из-за тёмной энергии? Новый подход говорит: нет, её тянет квантовое условие из будущего. Это как финальный аккорд симфонии, заставляющий оркестр играть быстрее, чтобы достичь последней ноты. Солитон Черна-Саймонса, скрытый в далёком грядущем, искривляет историю расширения. Возможно, мы живём внутри огромного квантового постселекта. Следы этого рывка можно искать в реликтовом излучении. И если мы их найдём, придётся признать: будущее реальнее прошлого.

title: Collapse of supermassive dark stars: the key to JWST’s ‘little red dots’?
oneliner: Giant stars powered by dark matter annihilation can collapse into quasi-stars, explaining the enigmatic objects of the early Universe.
description: JWST data revealed a population of compact, extremely red and bright sources at high redshifts — ‘little red dots’ (LRDs). Their nature remains a puzzle: standard stellar or active galactic nucleus models fail to explain their spectra. One candidate is quasi-stars: massive envelopes around accreting
abstract: The nature of 'little red dots' (LRDs) based on JWST data is a profound mystery. The quasi-star model (shells around black holes born from the collapse of supermassive stars) looks promising, but the classic scenario requires rare conditions: a strong Lyman-Werner background to suppress molecular cooling, a high accretion rate for entropy stratification, and rotation to prevent collapse down to ~10⁶ M⊙. It has been shown that supermassive dark stars, fueled by dark matter annihilation, naturally bypass these constraints and form quasi-stars. The resulting black holes immediately gain ≳10% of the progenitor's mass, and the envelope expands, cooling to the opacity limit (Teff~3000–6000 K), characteristic of zero metallicity. Such cold, unresolved photospheres reproduce the spectra and morphology of many LRDs.
threads: Телескоп Джеймс Уэбб обнаружил в ранней Вселенной «маленькие красные точки» — компактные ультраяркие объекты, не вписывающиеся в учебники. Возможно, это оболочки вокруг сверхмассивных чёрных дыр, раздутые аннигиляцией тёмной материи. Звезда размером с Солнечную систему, живущая не от ядерного синтеза, а от частиц скрытого сектора. Это не только объясняет загадку, но и даёт косвенный портрет тёмной материи. Мы заглядываем в эпоху, где привычная физика уступает место чему-то бо

title: Stellar rotation explains fading flares in repeated tidal disruptions
oneliner: The initially rapid rotation of a star captured by a black hole via the Hills mechanism leads to a gradual decline in brightness of repeating tidal flares, resolving a long-standing discrepancy between models and observations.
description: Some candidates for repeating partial tidal disruption events (rpTDE) show flares with ever-dimming peaks. Hydrodynamic simulations reveal that if a main-sequence star initially rotates rapidly in the prograde direction and was captured by a supermassive black hole through binary disruption, the tid
abstract: Repeating partial tidal disruptions of a star by a supermassive black hole (rpTDE) can cause transients with rebrightenings after months or years. For some candidates, a sequential decrease in peak luminosity is observed — a trend not reproduced by theoretical models when the star survives multiple encounters. It is suggested that the trend is explained by the initially rapid rotation of the star, expected if it resulted from the breakup of a tight binary system near the black hole (Hills mechanism). The hypothesis was tested with hydrodynamic simulations: massive (≥ 1 M⊙) main-sequence stars, repeatedly partially disrupted by a 10^6 M⊙ black hole. Indeed, with prograde rotation at tens of percent of the critical speed, successive flares became dimmer. This is strong circumstantial evidence for the launch of stars in rpTDE via the Hills mechanism.
threads: Открытие: загадка затухающих вспышек у повторных TDE решена — виной всему быстрое вращение звезды. Представьте фигуристку: если она уже кружится как волчок, дополнительный толчок бесполезен. Так и звезда, изначально вращающаяся в такт движению, не отдаёт чёрной дыре всё больше вещества — её огонь гаснет от встречи к встрече. Теперь мы знаем, что это признак рождения через механизм Хиллса: одна звезда в паре захвачена, вторая выброшена навсегда. Скоро JWST и LSST откроют сотни

title: How the Outskirts of Ancient Galaxies “Unburden” the Early Universe
oneliner: Detailed images from JWST reveal that massive quiescent galaxies at the dawn of time may not be so anomalous after all: their centers are redder than their outskirts, changing mass and age estimates.
description: Astronomers using the James Webb Space Telescope and medium-band filters from the MINERVA survey investigated four supermassive quiescent galaxies at redshifts z>3, previously considered to “break” the standard cosmological model. It turned out that for most of them, color gradients — redder centers
abstract: Analysis of color gradients in four massive (log(M*/M☉) > 11) quiescent galaxies at redshifts z > 3, previously considered problematic for models, shows that earlier estimates based on slit spectroscopy may have been inaccurate. Using MINERVA/JWST medium-band photometry, emission was resolved in a series of elliptical rings out to 0.7″ (~4 effective radii). Negative color gradients (bluer toward the periphery) were found in three galaxies; for the most extreme case (Δ(U–V)/ΔR = –0.126±0.030 mag kpc⁻¹), stellar mass is 0.1 dex lower than photometry within the NIRSpec slit. If gradients are entirely driven by age, tension with extreme-value statistics models weakens up to z~9.5, though the choice of stellar population models also matters. The results underscore the need for integral field spectroscopy: spatially resolved spectra will break the age-dust-metallicity degeneracy and reliably separate contributions from observed gradients and model assumptions.
threads: Невероятные древние галактики оказались не такими уж невозможными: мы просто заглядывали в их «исторический центр», принимая возраст старейших звёзд за возраст всего мегаполиса. JWST показывает, что ядра краснее, а окраины моложе — значит, тёмная материя и ΛCDM вовсе не в кризисе, просто наши измерения становятся точнее. И главная интрига: одна из галактик сформировалась, когда Вселенной было всего 300 миллионов лет — жизнь там могла бы возникнуть до рождения Солнечной систем

title: The Life and Death of Stars That Capture Primordial Black Holes
oneliner: Primordial black holes can be captured by stars and either quietly consume them or trigger an explosive finale with bright electromagnetic signals.
description: Primordial black holes (PBHs) in the asteroid-mass range remain dark matter candidates. A new study models the full evolutionary cycle of a star that captured a PBH for the first time: from three-body gravitational capture and migration to the core, to accretion and disk formation. The system's fate
threads: В сердце многих звёзд может тлеть невидимая искра — первичная чёрная дыра, зажжённая в первые мгновения после Большого взрыва. Чаще всего она паразитирует тихо, но иногда превращает звезду в космический маяк, выбрасывающий джеты ярче галактики. Мы живём в момент, когда гравитационные обсерватории могут уловить этот предсмертный сигнал.

title: Lyman-alpha Pressure: A Key Feedback Player at Cosmic Dawn
oneliner: First two-dimensional simulations show that Lyman-alpha radiation pressure dominates pre-supernova feedback in dust-poor early galaxies, dramatically altering star formation and black hole growth.
description: A nearly century-long debate about the dynamical role of Lyman-alpha (Lyα) radiation pressure has taken a new turn. Analytical estimates and one-dimensional calculations have hinted at its dominance over other feedback mechanisms at Cosmic Dawn, but the lack of multidimensional modeling left the que
abstract: The dynamic role of Lyman-α radiation pressure feedback has remained uncertain due to a lack of multidimensional calculations. This work presents the first two-dimensional radiation hydrodynamics (RHD) simulations using the Lydion code, which implements the M1 moment method for Lyα transfer with dust dynamics and achieves ~100× speed-up compared to Monte Carlo. Modeling star clusters in dense low-metallicity (Z/Z⊙ ≤ 0.01) clouds showed that Lyα pressure strongly boosts outflows and dominates over direct and infrared radiation, producing forces (2–16) Lbol/c and boost factors MF ≈ 10–60. Although leakage in regions of low optical depth, Doppler shifts, and photon destruction weaken the effect, they do not prevent strong pressure buildup in H II regions. Thus, Lyα feedback raises the threshold gas surface density for efficient star formation and is currently missing from almost all galaxy simulations.
threads: Фотон лайман-альфа в плотном газе — не просто свет. Запертый в атомном лабиринте, он мечется, с каждым отскоком толкая вещество. Тысячи, миллионы раз. Так рождается призрачный ветер, способный разметать целые звёздные колыбели. Первые симуляции показали: этот ветер в десятки раз сильнее прямого света. Возможно, именно он вылепил первые галактики.

title: Quantum fluctuations of light: how gravitons blur causality
oneliner: Quantum fluctuations of gravitons turn light cones from sharp boundaries into blurred probability clouds, which could radically change our understanding of black holes.
description: In classical physics, causality is strict: events can only influence each other within the light cone. But quantum gravity introduces uncertainty. Physicists computed the commutator of a scalar field in the presence of gravitons and showed that the support of the commutator becomes operator-valued.
abstract: We compute the commutator of a scalar field minimally coupled to gravity at first order in G_N. The commutator turns out to be operator-valued and contains terms with derivatives of Dirac delta functions, whose support is the Minkowski light cone. When evaluated on classical (coherent) graviton states, these terms bend the support of the commutator exactly so as to reproduce standard causality in classical curved spacetime. However, these same terms have variance, thus introducing uncertainty into causal connections between events. For a thermal state of gravitons at temperature T, we find that the probability distribution for [φ(t, x), φ(0)] ≠ 0 is Gaussian in x², centered on the classical light cone, with variance Var(x²) = 16 G_N T t³/3. This result is obtained after subtracting the universal vacuum contribution, which diverges logarithmically in the ultraviolet and is suppressed at large times.
threads: Световой конус — хрустальная граница между прошлым и будущим. Но квантовые дрожания гравитонов превращают эту грань в туманное марево. Вблизи чёрной дыры горизонт событий может стать размытым задолго до испарения. Классическая геометрия тает, уступая вероятностям — возможно, именно так природа скрывает сингулярности.

title: Elemental Spectra of Cosmic Rays: Two Galactic Sources and the Extragalactic Transition Beyond the Knee
oneliner: A new analysis of protons, helium, and iron reveals two populations of galactic sources and an immediate emergence of an extragalactic component after the main knee.
description: Analysis of precision data from DAMPE, LHAASO, and IceTop on the spectra of protons, helium, and iron in the energy range 40 GeV – 500 PeV showed that the observed fluxes are well described by a sum of three components: a low-energy galactic component with a convex spectrum, a high-energy galactic c
abstract: The energy spectra of individual elements in cosmic rays in the range from 100×Z GeV to 1000×Z PeV exhibit two 'knee' breaks with rigidity dependence: at energies of about 15×Z TeV and 3×Z PeV, as well as three 'ankle' flattenings. The first ankle (≈500×Z GeV) also depends on rigidity, but the second (≈150 TeV for protons, ~1 PeV for helium) and, probably, the third (≈100 PeV for protons) do not. Thanks to the high measurement precision in the DAMPE and LHAASO experiments, as well as IceTop, it was possible for the first time to establish that all spectral features are well described by the sum of three components: a low-energy galactic component (with a convex spectral shape, fading after the TeV knee), a high-energy galactic component (including the PeV knee), and an extragalactic component. No additional galactic component is required in the 10 PeV – 1 EeV interval.
threads: На отметке 3 ПэВ галактический оркестр замолкает — но не слышно тишины. Внегалактические источники подхватывают мелодию без задержки, словно дирижёр передал палочку, и новый состав уже играет. Долгое время считалось, что наш Млечный Путь солирует вплоть до 4 ЭэВ. Теперь ясно: финал наступает раньше, и космические лучи с высочайшими энергиями — это гастролёры из далёкой вселенной.

title: Why do 'little red dots' vanish at z<3: evolution of environment and halo mass
oneliner: A change of environment and rapid halo mass growth turn the mysterious compact objects of the early Universe into ordinary galaxies.
description: 'Little red dots' (LRDs) — compact sources discovered by JWST at high redshifts — possess anomalously massive black holes and are much rarer at z<3. The study investigates the large-scale environment structure of 98 spectroscopically confirmed LRDs. It finds that at z>4 they prefer underdense region
abstract: The scarcity of Little Red Dots (LRDs) at $z<3$ stands in stark contrast to their abundance in earlier epochs. A study of their cosmic environment revealed that at $z>4$ they reside in underdense regions compared to the general galaxy population, but by $z \sim 3.5$ the contrast disappears. Dark matter halo masses, inferred from large-scale clustering, grow rapidly: from $\lesssim 10^{10.1} \, M_{\odot}$ at $z \sim 7.5$ to $\sim 10^{11.3} \, M_{\odot}$ at $z \sim 3.5$, approaching those of normal galaxies. The empirical stellar mass–halo mass relation yields stellar masses; the black holes remain overmassive at $z>4$, but converge to the local $M_* - M_{\rm BH}$ relation by $z \sim 3.5$. Increasing halo mass drives galaxy size growth due to enhanced rotation, and LRDs lose their compactness. Exhaustion of dense gas and/or boosted star formation alters their spectral energy distribution.
threads: В ранней Вселенной JWST заметил рубиновые точки — компактные коконы с чёрными дырами внутри. Они прячутся в разреженных областях, но когда кокон тёмной материи набирает массу, галактика расширяется и превращается в обычную. Этот танец объясняет, как возникали сверхмассивные чёрные дыры — словно куколки, становившиеся бабочками. Телескоп Roman сможет поймать миг исчезновения этих галактических куколок.

title: ExoVeil: How a Single Transit Shadow Reveals Exoplanets
oneliner: The ExoVeil machine-learning system detects exoplanets from a single transit, predicting a star’s normal brightness and flagging anomalies.
description: To detect distant worlds, astronomers usually wait for multiple passes of a planet across a star’s disk. But ExoVeil, using a Transformer architecture and self-supervised learning on 16,499 Kepler light curves, learned to recognize even single transits. A blind search uncovered 179 new candidates in
abstract: EXOVEIL is a transit-finding system that operates on raw flux time series and can detect single transits. Based on a Transformer model trained with transit masking on 16,499 Kepler light curves, it predicts the expected stellar flux; a variance-weighted matched filter extracts signals from the prediction residuals. An XGBoost classifier separates planets from false positives (AUC 0.938 on Kepler DR25). When injecting single transits with 1000 ppm depth, the system recovers 32%—a task where all classification methods show 0%. A blind search of 3737 Kepler stars revealed 179 new transit-like signals, including 46 single-transit candidates. Without retraining, the system detected all 47 confirmed TESS planets in the PLATO LOPS2 field, demonstrating cross-mission transferability. At PLATO’s 25-second cadence, transits down to 100 ppm are detectable, approaching the Earth-analog regime. Conformal prediction was applied for the first time, with an empirical coverage of 95.9%. The code, pre-trained weights, and candidate catalog are open-source (pip install exoveil).
threads: Одиночный транзит экзопланеты — как пропущенная буква в длинной книге. ExoVeil учит грамматику звёздного света, замечая малейшие «опечатки» на кривых блеска. Звезда пульсирует словно сердце, и даже лёгкий сбой ритма выдаёт невидимую планету. Благодаря такому подходу миссия PLATO сможет находить двойники Земли, даже если те лишь раз мелькнут на фоне своего солнца. Мы начинаем читать язык Галактики.

title: HC5N in TW Hydrae's disk: first detection of long cyanopolyynes in a protoplanetary disk
oneliner: Astronomers have detected HC5N molecule in a protoplanetary disk for the first time, pushing the boundaries of prebiotic chemistry in 'stellar nurseries'.
description: A team led by Steven C. Wampler, using the ALMA radio telescope, discovered the HC5N molecule in the protoplanetary disk of TW Hydrae — the longest cyanopolyyne ever recorded in a Class II disk. This finding shows that complex carbon chains can form and survive in the environment where planets are b
threads: В диске TW Гидры, молодой Солнечной системе в 60 парсеках от нас, астрономы поймали сигнал HC5N — углеродной цепочки из пяти атомов с азотом. Она пережила рождение планет, словно верёвка, прошедшая сквозь горн. Эти нити вплетаются в кометы и, возможно, несут пребиотические узоры на будущие Земли. Новые телескопы разглядят ещё более длинные цепочки — и, быть может, мы прочтём химическую партитуру жизни.

title: Nereid — Neptune's Last Regular Moon: Discovery with JWST
oneliner: JWST spectroscopy and dynamical simulations suggest Nereid likely isn't a captured Kuiper Belt object but formed around Neptune.
description: Neptune's third-largest moon, Nereid, was long considered an irregular moon captured from the Kuiper Belt. But new near-infrared observations from the James Webb Space Telescope revealed spectral features that don't match any known type of Kuiper Belt object. Combined with computer simulations recre
threads: Всю жизнь Нереида притворялась чужой. Её записали в пленницы пояса Койпера. Но JWST разглядел её истинное лицо: кристаллический лёд и ржавчина, невозможные для пришельца. Симуляции восстановили драму: она — последняя выжившая из первого хора спутников, искалеченная вторжением Тритона. Теперь она танцует одна — единственная уцелевшая нота разрушенной симфонии. И галактика, возможно, полна таких же сирот.

title: Cosmic Strings: How a Precise Decay Calculation Reshapes the Gravitational-Wave Universe
oneliner: New numerical simulations reveal that metastable cosmic strings decay faster than predicted by the thin-string approximation, demanding a revision of cosmological forecasts.
description: Cosmic strings—one-dimensional topological defects with colossal energy density—could have formed in the early Universe. Their decay via quantum production of monopole-antimonopole pairs determines whether they survive to the present day and what gravitational-wave signal they leave behind. Traditio
threads: Космические струны — возможно, самые туго натянутые объекты в истории мироздания. Каждый сантиметр сжат чудовищной силой в миллион тонн. Их разрыв — квантовое исчезновение, прыжок из бытия в ничто. Мы думали, что этот процесс тянется веками; теперь знаем — он стремителен. Слишком быстр, чтобы звучать басами в гравитационном хоре. Но именно эта торопливая гибель дарит надежду наземным детекторам — уловить их высокий, пронзительный финальный аккорд.

title: Cosmic Sweetness: Erythrulose – The First Sugar in the Interstellar Medium
oneliner: In a molecular cloud at the Galactic Center, astronomers have detected for the first time the four-carbon ketose sugar erythrulose, pointing to the possibility of prebiotic synthesis of sugars in space.
description: Using the ultra-sensitive Yebes 40m and IRAM 30m radio telescopes, scientists identified spectral lines of erythrulose (C₄H₈O₄) in the molecular cloud G+0.693. This discovery proves for the first time that sugars, key components of nucleic acids, can be synthesized in the interstellar medium from si
abstract: The origin of monosaccharides in prebiotic conditions is a central problem in origin-of-life research. Laboratory syntheses yield insufficient concentrations, and findings of sugars in meteorites point to their extraterrestrial origin. This is the first report of a sugar (erythrulose, a chiral C4-ketose) detected in the interstellar medium. The detection was made using data from ultra-sensitive broadband spectral surveys of the molecular cloud G+0.693-0.027 in the direction of the Galactic center, performed with the Yebes 40m and IRAM 30m telescopes. Erythrulose is at least eight times more abundant than similar three-carbon sugars, which remained undetected. Quantum-chemical and astrochemical models show that erythrulose efficiently forms on interstellar dust grains from simpler two-carbon aldehydes and alcohols. Since ketoses easily isomerize to aldoses in aqueous environments, interstellar erythrulose could have replenished the pool of sugars available for early metabolic and replication processes.
threads: Эритрулоза — сахар, знакомый любителям автозагара, — плавает в облаке у центра Галактики. В морозной тишине, на ледяных пылинках, молекулы сами собираются в узоры жизни. Химия без пробирок, в галактическом масштабе. Фред Хойл мечтал, что облака сеют жизнь; теперь мы находим в них сахарную пыльцу. Возможно, наша биохимия началась с чужого рецепта.

title: Evaporating Primordial Black Holes and the Mystery of Lithium-7 Deficit
oneliner: Evaporation of primordial black holes could have destroyed the excess lithium-7, aligning Big Bang predictions with observed abundance.
description: The primordial lithium-7 problem is a major contradiction in standard cosmology: Big Bang nucleosynthesis theory predicts three times more lithium-7 than observed in old stars. The authors of this new work propose an elegant solution: the excess lithium is destroyed by neutrons born from the evapora
abstract: A mechanism is proposed to reduce the theoretically predicted overabundance of lithium-7 using baryons evaporated from primordial black holes. It is shown that neutron capture by lithium-7 nuclei leads to the formation of unstable lithium-8 or beryllium-8 nuclei, which rapidly decay into two helium-4 nuclei. As a result, the fraction of lithium-7 relative to baryon density can be lowered to observed values. This scenario connects the physics of primordial black holes with the solution to the longstanding cosmological problem of light element abundance.
threads: Пересолив литиевый суп, Вселенная тут же призвала на помощь крошечных поваров — первичные чёрные дыры. Их нейтронные щипцы аккуратно превратили избыток лития-7 в гелий, сшив теорию с наблюдениями и оставив шрам в первозданном свете. Ошибок нет — есть лишь тонкая настройка.

title: Hidden Growth of Supermassive Black Holes from a Parallel Brane
oneliner: Five-dimensional black strings allow mass to accumulate from a hidden sector, explaining the mysterious giants of the early universe.
description: Why did black holes of a billion solar masses already exist in the young universe? Standard accretion mechanisms can't keep up. A new hypothesis suggests that our brane shares a common horizon with a neighboring, invisible brane. Matter falling onto that hidden side of the horizon increases the tota
threads: Видимая крона массивной чёрной дыры в нашей Вселенной обманчива: её истинные корни уходят в невидимый субстрат параллельной браны. Там, в пятом измерении, скрыт источник роста гиганта. Детектор LISA готовится услышать гравитационный шум этих корней, превращая теорию в слышимую симфонию пространства-времени.

title: Tiny Red Dots: An Ultraviolet Look at the Mysterious Compact Objects of the Young Universe
oneliner: JWST has discovered a population of compact red objects whose ultraviolet emission helps reveal the nature of growing supermassive black holes.
description: The James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) has uncovered a new enigmatic population of objects dubbed 'little red dots' (LRDs). Analysis of about a hundred of these objects shows their ultraviolet light is unlike that from normal galaxies: it's redder and more compact. Scientists suspect this light comes
threads: Всего через 600 миллионов лет после Большого взрыва в космической тьме уже горят красные огни. Это не обычные звёзды и не галактики — это растущие сверхмассивные чёрные дыры, окутанные плотными газовыми коконами. Их ультрафиолетовое свечение, пробиваясь сквозь толщу вещества, приобретает оттенок закатного солнца. Понять природу этих «красных фонариков» — значит приблизиться к разгадке одной из главных загадок: как во Вселенной так рано появились гигантские чёрные дыры.

title: How Cosmic Carbon Rings are Born: Ion Chemistry in Cold Clouds
oneliner: Ion-molecule reactions involving C₁₁H₉⁺ lead to the formation of acenaphthene derivatives — important precursors of polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbons in the interstellar medium.
description: Scientists studied the reactivity of C₁₁H₉⁺ ions with methylnaphthalenes under conditions mimicking cold molecular clouds. Experiments on the PIRENEA setup showed the formation of C₁₂H₁₁⁺ and C₁₃H₁₃⁺ products, which upon irradiation transform into the stable acenaphthylene cation. Quantum chemical c
abstract: Using the multipurpose PIRENEA setup, the reactivity of benzylium-type isomers C₁₁H₉⁺ with dimethylnaphthalene was investigated under isolated conditions mimicking radiative association. Products C₁₂H₁₁⁺ and C₁₃H₁₃⁺ were detected, their ratio depending on the specific dimethylnaphthalene isomer. Subsequent UV-visible irradiation allowed the identification of the acenaphthylene radical cation C₁₂H₈•⁺ as the most stable photofragment. Density functional theory calculations and molecular dynamics simulations confirm that long-lived ion-molecular complexes promote the formation of C-C bonds and the closure of a five-membered ring. The results point to a new pathway for the formation of five-membered rings during the growth of polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbons under low-pressure and low-temperature conditions, which may explain the recent detection of acenaphthylene-like particles in the cold cloud TMC-1.
threads: В сердце холодных облаков, где царит почти абсолютный ноль, углеродные ионы роятся, как пчёлы. Они прививают метильные группы к ароматическим кольцам, создавая стабильные катионы — зародыши космической органики. Возможно, именно так Вселенная вышивает молекулярные узоры, ведущие к жизни.

title: Cosmic Duel: How Gravitational Waves and Lenses Help Resolve Cosmology's Biggest Dispute
oneliner: The combined use of gravitational-wave standard sirens and strong lensing has, for the first time, enabled a measurement of the Hubble constant without relying on any cosmological model.
description: The Hubble constant, which determines the expansion rate of the Universe, remains the subject of fierce debate: measurements in the early and late Universe diverge by 6σ. To adjudicate this 'Hubble tension,' astrophysicists combined data from 142 gravitational-wave events in the GWTC-4 catalog with
threads: Вселенная расширяется, и два классических метода дают настолько разные ответы, что это превратилось в кризис космологии. Новый подход сталкивает две независимые линейки: гравитационные волны от слияния чёрных дыр и гигантские линзы из света квазаров. Первые напрямую измеряют расстояние, вторые — геометрию. Вместе они выносят независимый вердикт. Пока точность хромает, но телескопы следующего поколения помогут выяснить, кто был прав — Planck или сверхновые.

title: Neutron Stars Narrow the Limits of Color Superconductivity
oneliner: Multi-messenger observations of neutron stars, combined with Bayesian inference, have put tight limits on the color superconductivity order parameter in quark matter.
description: By combining data from NICER, LIGO, and heavy pulsars with quantum chromodynamics theory, scientists explored the properties of dense matter in neutron star cores. A hybrid parametrization of the equation of state using Gaussian processes and neural networks provided, for the first time, tight const
abstract: At asymptotically high densities, QCD predicts a transition of quark matter into a color-flavor-locked (CFL) superconducting phase, but away from the asymptotics, the gap magnitude is undetermined. Multimessenger observations of neutron stars are combined with perturbative QCD and chiral effective theory in a Bayesian analysis using a neural network parameterization of the equation of state. Matching with QCD at a baryon chemical potential of 2.6 GeV, including next-to-leading order corrections for the CFL contribution, yields a gap Δ*_CFL = 34^{+32}_{-28} MeV and an upper limit of 66 MeV (95% credible) — twice as precise and at the lower end of model predictions. For the first time, a constraint on the high-order pressure constant pQCD: c0 = -21^{+9}_{-8} is obtained. It is shown that color-superconducting pairing contributes only a small amount to the pressure, deepening the connection between observable stellar parameters and the phase diagram of strong interactions.
threads: В сердце нейтронной звезды кварки сплетаются в дуэты и кружатся в замысловатом танце, скованном цветом и ароматом. Новый анализ пульсаций и гравитационных волн показал: он куда тише, чем мы воображали, — словно безмолвный вальс под сурдинку. Когда инструменты будущего позволят расслышать самые слабые ритмы, мы, быть может, впервые уловим подлинный голос экзотической материи, что прежде звучал лишь со страниц фантастических романов.

title: First Confident SiO Signal in the Atmosphere of a Directly Imaged Companion TWA5B: A Key to Refractory Material and Clouds
oneliner: High-resolution M-band spectroscopy has detected gaseous silicon monoxide in the young super-Jupiter TWA5B, revealing its refractory composition and the absence of silicate clouds.
description: Using the CRIRES+ spectrograph on the VLT in the 3.5–5.2 µm range, the CRIMSON team for the first time robustly detected SiO lines (S/N=7.5) in the atmosphere of the directly imaged companion TWA5B. This allowed them to measure the refractory silicon abundance and, combined with CO and H2O data, rec
abstract: In the spectrum of the giant exoplanet TWA 5 B, obtained in the M-band with the CRIRES+ instrument, gaseous SiO was confidently detected (signal-to-noise ratio = 7.5) via its ro-vibrational band at 4 µm. The SiO abundance was log(SiO) = -3.56^{+0.42}_{-0.32} by volume, indicating nearly complete absence of magnesium-silicate cloud condensation — silicon is present almost exclusively in the gas phase. Joint analysis with volatile species CO (S/N=9.1) and H₂O (S/N=18.8) yielded C/O (stellar), O/Si and C/Si (moderately sub-stellar) ratios, as well as a super-stellar Si/H ([Si/H]_star = 1.41^{+0.42}_{-0.32}). These proportions are consistent with formation via core accretion beyond the CO snowline or via gravitational instability with subsequent solid enrichment. Gas-phase SiO is a unique tracer of cloud properties in hot gas giants, enabling the study of dominant condensates in populations of directly imaged planets and isolated brown dwarfs.
threads: Кремний — основа скал — в атмосфере горячего супер-юпитера TWA5B испарён и светится, словно газ в неоновой трубке. CRIRES+ поймал монооксид кремния — дым из космической плавильни, где выплавлялись силикатные глыбы. Обилие SiO говорит, что облака ещё не окутали этот мир. С новыми телескопами мы поймаем момент их конденсации и нарисуем первую карту облачности для сотен далёких планет.
