title: Diocotron Instability in Pulsar Magnetospheres: Charge Diffusion and Radio Variability
oneliner: 3D simulations reveal how diocotron instability in the closed field-line region of a pulsar magnetosphere triggers charge diffusion and radio emission modulation, explaining pulsar variability.
description: Diocotron instability is a non-axisymmetric plasma instability caused by differential rotation in the equatorial plane of pulsar magnetospheres. The authors ran a series of 3D PIC simulations for aligned and oblique rotators. The instability grows within roughly one rotation period and gives rise to
abstract: Diocotron instability is a non-axisymmetric plasma instability expected in the differentially rotating equatorial plane of pulsar magnetospheres. 3D PIC simulations were performed for aligned and oblique rotators. The instability grows on timescales of the rotation period and forms a stable m=1 mode—a rotating dipole charge asymmetry in the equatorial disk. Stochastic fluctuations in the mode’s amplitude and angular velocity trigger cross-field diffusion, rapidly transporting charges through the closed zone to the light cylinder. In the nonlinear phase, the m=1 mode generates electric field perturbations that can modulate the polar cap potential drop and the radiation beam angle, which are linked to nulling, periodic amplitude modulation, and drifting subpulses.
threads: Электрические вихри в сердце пульсара живут своей жизнью: они разрастаются за доли секунды и заставляют заряды танцевать поперёк магнитных линий. Словно дрожащий камертон, дипольная мода модулирует радиоимпульс, порождая загадочные нуллинги и дрейфы. Моделирование предсказывает, что новые радиотелескопы смогут увидеть этот танец в деталях — и тогда пульсары заговорят на языке плазменных неустойчивостей.

title: Relativistic dynamics of light sails: how specular and diffuse reflection govern acceleration to sub-light speeds
oneliner: A thorough analysis of radiation dynamics showed that the contribution of diffuse scattering to sail thrust turns into braking upon reaching a speed of 0.75c, but the total force continues to accelerate the craft.
description: The article systematically investigates for the first time the influence of incident, specularly reflected, and diffusely scattered light on the thrust of a high-speed relativistic light sail. Using radiation dynamics equations, it is shown that due to the Doppler effect, the thrust of all three com
abstract: Light sail technology is one of the most promising methods for interstellar travel, having passed the stage of orbital testing. This work, for the first time and based on radiation dynamics, systematically investigates the influence of incident, mirror-reflected, and diffusely scattered light on a relativistic sail (moving at near-light speed). It is established that due to the Doppler effect, the thrust of all three components decreases with increasing speed: the strongest is from incident light, weaker from mirror reflection, and weakest from diffuse scattering. A critical speed exists for the thrust from scattered light: exceeding it turns this component into a drag force, although the total radiation force continues to accelerate the craft. Equations of motion were constructed and numerically solved; it is shown that the main speed increase is concentrated in the initial phase of acceleration, and as speed grows, efficiency drops. The study provides a rigorous theoretical foundation for light sail dynamics.
threads: Разогнавшись до 0.75c, парус вдруг чувствует встречный ветер из собственного света — как сёрфер, которого его же брызги начинают тормозить. Будущее межзвёздных гонок будет балансировать на этой грани, где фотоны перестают быть попутчиками. Чтобы добраться до иных миров, придётся научиться танцевать с квантами так, чтобы не споткнуться о порог трёх четвертей световой.

title: The Shape of the Universe: Measuring Spatial Curvature with Gravitational Waves
oneliner: Mergers of massive black holes can tell us whether our Universe is flat.
description: Gravitational waves from the mergers of compact objects like black holes act as 'standard sirens'—they can measure cosmological distances without calibration. If an electromagnetic counterpart is detected, the event becomes a 'bright siren', providing independent distances and redshifts. New work sh
threads: Каждое слияние — удар в исполинский космический гонг. По затуханию и обертонам гравитационных волн мы определяем натяжение ткани пространства. Детекторы Cosmic Explorer и Einstein Telescope измерят кривизну с точностью до 0.029 — и если она не ноль, стандартная модель треснет. Мы учимся слышать форму мироздания.

title: Accreting white dwarf: periodic radio pulses in a binary system
oneliner: Astronomers discovered a binary system with a white dwarf that emits strictly periodic radio bursts and X-ray emission, confirming the link between cataclysmic variables and mysterious long-period radio transients.
description: The recently discovered object ASKAP J1745−5051 turned out to be an accreting magnetic white dwarf in a close binary system with an orbital period of just 1.37 hours. Using radio interferometers ASKAP, ATCA, and MeerKAT, as well as optical and X-ray telescopes, scientists recorded periodic radio pul
abstract: Long-period radio transients (LPTs) are coherent bursts of polarized emission with periods from minutes to hours. Their origin remained unclear: slowly rotating magnetars or binary systems with white dwarfs were candidates. This work reports the discovery and classification of LPT ASKAP J174508.9-505149 as an accreting white dwarf binary. The object has an orbital period of ~1.3 hours, displays orbitally modulated X-ray emission, and radio bursts with elliptical polarization. The burst frequency drifts, possibly due to a longer beat period, and disappears for several hours. It is spectroscopically confirmed as a cataclysmic variable via optical emission lines and an ongoing X-ray outburst. The results point to a connection between at least some LPTs and white dwarf binaries.
threads: Белый карлик размером с Землю и красный карлик кружат в смертельном вальсе, порождая радиоимпульсы, в сто раз горячее солнечного ядра. Словно звездный оркестр играет на струнах магнитного поля. Такие системы могут оказаться ключом к природе самых загадочных радиотранзиентов и даже предвестниками сверхновых.

title: Levitating Graphite Catches Lunar Embraces: A New Miniature Gravimeter
oneliner: Scientists have created an ultrasensitive gravimeter the size of a teacup, capable of detecting the tidal forces of the Moon and Sun.
description: Researchers at the University of Southampton have demonstrated a levitated optomechanical sensor (LOMS) that measures Earth tides with a sensitivity of 18 microgal in 6 seconds. The device, with a volume of just 50 ml, uses diamagnetic levitation of graphite above permanent magnets and optical inter
abstract: Gravity mapping is a cornerstone geophysical technique for studying mass distribution and transfer. Natural processes and human activities (mining, ice melt) alter the gravity field, changes measured by gravimeters. Here, a levitating mechanical sensor (LOMS) is demonstrated, delivering a resolved sensitivity of 18 microgals, a wide dynamic range, and a 6-second integration time; the projected sensitivity is below 200 nanogals per root hertz in a package of only a few cubic centimeters. The device records Earth tidal signals, showcasing stability on a par with the best existing systems. Unlike conventional accelerometers, which suffer from limited stability, this unit functions as a true gravimeter. Its tiny footprint and low anticipated cost enable scalable deployment, including drone-borne aerogravity surveys (at 10–100 m altitudes), distributed networks, and multi-pixel gravity matrices. The platform paves the way for high-precision, cost-effective, planetary-scale gravity monitoring.
threads: Лепесток графита парит в магнитной колыбели, улавливая приливный вальс Луны и Солнца. Мягче паутины, он танцует под лазерным лучом. Скоро рой таких сенсоров поднимется в небо на дронах, раскинет невидимую сеть вокруг вулканов и начнёт выслеживать тёмную материю, вслушиваясь в шёпот Большого взрыва.

title: The Entire Sky in Radio Lines: Hunting for Alien Signals and Dark Matter
oneliner: Scientists scanned the entire sky with a record spectral resolution of 10 Hz to search for radio signals from other civilizations or traces of dark matter particles.
description: Using the OVRO–LWA radio interferometer, a research team conducted an unprecedented survey of the sky in the 50–86 MHz range at 10 Hz resolution. A 30-second exposure yielded over three million images of the entire hemisphere. The search for ultra-narrow lines found no candidates of extraterrestrial
abstract: A survey search for technosignatures in the decameter band (50–86 MHz) was performed using the OVRO-LWA array. Voltage data were digitized and analyzed on GPUs with a frequency resolution of ~10 Hz, yielding over 3 million all-sky images for a single 30-second epoch. Candidate selection employed multichannel matched filtering, empirical noise normalization, and false discovery rate control. After rejecting extended sources and interference, three narrowband candidates with signal-to-noise ratios above 10 sigma were examined with high temporal and frequency resolution; all proved inconsistent with compact extraterrestrial emitters. The characteristic sensitivity reached ~100 Jy per channel over the entire visible hemisphere, giving 10-sigma limits on the equivalent isotropic radiated power of about 10^14 W at 10 pc and 10^18 W at a kiloparsec. The method simultaneously probes millions of stellar systems and provides a scalable framework for deeper observations, including searches for axion-like particles near neutron stars.
threads: 30 секунд — и 3 миллиона снимков неба. Телескоп OVRO прослушал эфир, но нашёл лишь тишину. Представьте: мы ищем не симфонию, а один-единственный чистый тон среди космического шума. Этот тон может быть голосом тёмной материи, превращающейся в радиоволну у нейтронной звезды. Когда-нибудь такой сигнал перевернёт физику. Пока — тишина. Но мы только начинаем слушать.

title: Polar Interstellar Meteor: A New Visitor from the Depths of the Galaxy
oneliner: NASA satellite data on a fireball over the South Atlantic strongly point to its interstellar origin.
description: Analysis of the fireball detected on April 1, 2026, over the South Atlantic showed its Sun-relative speed was 51.73 km/s — well above the local escape velocity. Accounting for Earth's gravitational acceleration, coordinate transforms, and Monte Carlo statistical modeling rules out a bound orbit with
abstract: A new interstellar meteor candidate, polarIM, has been registered. It entered the atmosphere on April 1, 2026, at 41.9° S, 54.7° W, at an altitude of 90.5 km. After transforming the velocity vector from the Earth-based system to the heliocentric frame and accounting for Earth's gravity, the heliocentric speed was determined to be 51.73 km/s, with the polar component (+47.09 km/s) itself exceeding the local escape velocity of 42.14 km/s. The specific orbital energy is positive at +450.1 km²/s², and the excess speed at infinity is 30.00 km/s. Monte Carlo modeling (1 million realizations) using the CNEOS error model (σ_v=0.55 km/s, σ_RA=1.35°, σ_Dec=0.84°) showed that no realization yielded a closed orbit, and the statistical confidence of interstellar origin is >99.9997%. The average velocity margin over escape is 9.60±0.75 km/s (12.8σ), making polarIM the most reliable candidate in the CNEOS catalog since 2018.
threads: Болид над Южной Атлантикой летел на 9,6 км/с быстрее, чем нужно для побега от Солнца. Это не камень из нашей системы — это бутылочная почта из-за пределов галактического архипелага. Даже одна вертикальная компонента скорости (+47 км/с) могла бы унести его в межзвёздную тьму. Такие гости приносят нам частицы чужих миров — без звездолётов. Мы на пороге «Свидания с Рамой»: тайны иных систем раскрываются при прямом контакте.

title: The Gaia Sausage Enigma: The Milky Way Survived Not One, But Multiple Major Mergers
oneliner: The Gaia Sausage/Enceladus structure, long thought to be the remnant of a single major merger, is actually composed of several stellar streams with distinct histories.
description: Using data from the DESI spectroscopic survey and a new clustering algorithm called GS3 Hunter, astronomers have discovered that the famous Gaia Sausage/Enceladus (GSE) structure in the inner halo of the Milky Way is not a homogeneous remnant of a single merger. Instead, four distinct substructures
abstract: The Gaia-Sausage-Enceladus (GSE) structure has traditionally been considered the remnant of the last major merger that shaped the inner halo of the Milky Way. However, analysis of DESI survey data using a new unsupervised clustering algorithm, GS³ Hunter, identified 17 structures in the local halo, including GSE and previously unknown streams. A detailed investigation of chronological, dynamical, and chemical properties revealed four distinct subgroups within the GSE region: GSE−GSH1 (age 12 Gyr), GSE−GSH2 (10 Gyr), GSE−GSH3 (8 Gyr), and GSE−GSH4 (7 Gyr). Despite overall similarities in phase-space distribution and elemental abundances, these subgroups exhibit notably different orbital actions and chemical compositions. These findings point to a complex formation history for GSE, which is not the product of a single event but a composite structure assembled through several successive mergers in the early evolution of the Galaxy.
threads: Галактическое гало — не монолит, а палимпсест из четырёх слоёв. Химический почерк сверхновых выдает историю каждого. Скоро телескопы превратят эти чернила в летопись, а распределение тёмной материи станет явным. Археология галактик начинается.

title: Late influx of material from a molecular cloud reshaped the outer Solar System
oneliner: Isotopic analysis of meteorites showed that gas giants accreted more than 30% comet-like material, and parent bodies of Ryugu-type asteroids formed near the water ice line.
description: Carbonaceous chondrites are the building blocks of the outer Solar System. Researchers from the University of Copenhagen analyzed the isotopic composition of silicon, iron, magnesium, and chromium in anomalous chondrites and found that their nucleosynthetic signatures reflect a mixture of two dust p
abstract: To understand the evolution of the outer protoplanetary disk and the delivery of volatiles (water, organics) to the inner region where terrestrial planets formed, scientists analyzed nucleosynthetic isotope systems of Si, Mg, Fe, and Cr in anomalous chondrites—unclassified analogs of carbonaceous chondrites. The results showed that the outer disk was replenished with isotopically distinct material from a molecular cloud, which constituted over 30% of the building block mass in the gas giant accretion zone. This late addition did not participate in the main accretion of terrestrial planets; instead, their volatile inventory was fully supplied by Ivuna-type planetesimals, such as Ryugu and Bennu. In the proposed model, these bodies formed near an inward-migrating snow line. The accretion of such icy planetesimals in the inner disk represents a fundamental shift in understanding Solar System evolution.
threads: Астероиды Рюгу и Бенну — не посланцы из ледяных бездн. Их изотопный почерк говорит: они сформировались у «снежной линии», где вода превращается в лёд. А потом в диск влилось кометное вещество — как специя, навсегда изменившая вкус блюда. Это переписывает историю доставки воды на Землю: возможно, она пришла не из далёкого холода, а из локального буфета. Образцы с Hayabusa2 и OSIRIS-REx раскроют детали.

title: What's Inside 'Little Red Dots': The Anatomy of Galactic Cores in the Early Universe
oneliner: Spectral analysis of distant 'dot' galaxies with the James Webb Space Telescope reveals a dense gas torus fueling a supermassive black hole at their centers.
description: Scientists studied 14 'Little Red Dots' (LRDs)—mysterious compact objects at high redshifts discovered by JWST. Using medium-resolution spectroscopy, they broke down the Balmer hydrogen lines into components, measured their ratios, and found signs of extremely dense gas (n_H > 10⁹ cm⁻³). It turns ou
threads: Ранняя Вселенная полна «красных точек» — это не пыльные галактики, а «голые» чёрные дыры в водородном тумане. Их свет краснеет, словно закатное солнце в дымке. Плотность газа там такая, что обычные законы не работают — линии водорода «захлёбываются» от тесноты. Возможно, именно эти объекты помогут понять, как сверхмассивные чёрные дыры стали гигантами ещё до появления звёзд.

title: Balance on the Edge: When a Star Can't Keep Up the Dance with a Black Hole
oneliner: New hydrodynamic simulations reveal a subtle mechanism that determines whether the eccentric mass exchange between a sun-like star and a black hole spins into uncontrolled destruction or remains stable.
description: In tight binary systems, where a star orbits a black hole along an elliptical path, mass loss can either stabilize the system or trigger a runaway disruption. Scientists ran multi-period SPH simulations and found that the system's fate hinges on the ratio of the initial pericenter distance to the ec
abstract: Binary systems can exchange mass while maintaining significant orbital eccentricity. Stellar-mass black holes can strip material from stars on eccentric orbits, causing micro tidal disruption events (micro-TDEs). Previous hydrodynamic studies focused on nearly circular systems, leaving the transition from self-regulated eccentric mass transfer to runaway disruption poorly understood. This work presents smoothed particle hydrodynamics (SPH) simulations of a Sun-like star interacting with a 10-solar-mass black hole at initial eccentricities of 0.30–0.70 and pericenter distances of 3.33–3.57 tidal radii; evolution was tracked over tens to over a hundred orbital periods. Two scenarios emerge: at b0 ≲ 3.45, mass loss at pericenter triggers adiabatic envelope expansion and runaway disruption, and the resulting accretion stream with a super-Eddington feeding rate can produce fast transients in X-rays/UV or optical; at b0 ≳ 3.57, the system enters a long-lived phase of stable mass transfer (up to 150 orbits), where the orbit expands due to mass loss.
threads: Всего несколько процентов расстояния решают, быть ли вечному вальсу или мгновенной вспышке. Моделирование показывает: за первые десятки витков становится ясно, устоит ли звезда. Лавина разрушения набирает силу от каждого сброшенного слоя — парадоксально расширяясь, звезда обрекает себя. Такие катаклизмы — ключ к расшифровке ярчайших космических взрывов.

title: Impact Rain 800 Million Years Ago: How the Breakup of Asteroid Eulalia Changed the Planets
oneliner: The breakup of asteroid Eulalia's parent body about 800 million years ago triggered a surge of bombardment that affected Earth, the Moon, Mars, and possibly the biosphere.
description: Modeling of the collisional and dynamical evolution of the Eulalia asteroid family reveals that its breakup led to a massive impact rain on the terrestrial planets. The method combines lunar crater chronology, dating of impact glasses and meteorites, and numerical simulations of debris migration. Th
abstract: The spike in large lunar impacts ~800 million years ago is linked to the breakup of a carbonaceous chondrite parent body of the Eulalia asteroid family ~800 million years ago near the 3:1 resonance with Jupiter. Collision and dynamical evolution modeling shows that ~75% of the family’s fragments slipped into the J3:1 resonance within ~150 million years: some right after the breakup, others gradually drifting via the Yarkovsky effect. Once in resonance, the fragments were pumped onto planet-crossing orbits, drastically increasing the hit rate on the Moon and terrestrial planets. This accounts for the birth of big craters like Copernicus. The event likely had global repercussions: on Earth, it aligns with biospheric disruptions possibly triggered by impacts, and on Mars, with a pulse of volcanic activity. So, collisions in the Main Belt can shape the saga of the entire inner solar system.
threads: 800 млн лет назад в поясе астероидов разбилась гигантская чернильница. Тёмные углистые брызги залили Землю, Луну и Марс, выбив кратеры-шрамы. Ударный дождь перетряхнул углеродный цикл и, возможно, изменил ход биосферы. Сегодня мы охотимся за этими космическими чернилами, чтобы прочесть летопись катастроф и подготовиться к новым грозам.

title: Dark mountains of neutron stars: gravitational waves probe dark matter
oneliner: Continuous gravitational waves from neutron stars with self-interacting dark matter allow the first constraints on unknown parameters of the dark sector.
description: Researchers combined a two-fluid model of neutron stars with fermionic dark matter and LIGO's continuous gravitational-wave search results. Anisotropic dark matter distributions can create 'dark mountains'—quadrupole deformations that amplify radiation. Comparing with LIGO's third observing run (O3)
threads: Внутри нейтронной звезды таится невидимая гора из тёмной материи — крошечный бугорок, но массой с Гималаи. Она превращает звезду в космический камертон: гравитационные волны разносят её звон по Вселенной. LIGO пока молчит, но это молчание уже очертило границы неведомого. Грядущие обсерватории смогут уловить эту музыку и, возможно, впервые коснуться тёмного сектора.

title: New Distances to NGC 1052 Galaxies: Testing the Bullet Dwarf Hypothesis
oneliner: Hubble and Webb measurements show that the mysterious line of dwarf galaxies without dark matter is not a projection illusion, but its exact structure still awaits an explanation.
description: A chain of ultra-diffuse dwarf galaxies lacking dark matter has been discovered in the field of NGC 1052. The “bullet dwarf” scenario explains their common origin via a high-speed collision. However, critics suggested the chain is an optical illusion caused by the superposition of two galaxy groups
threads: Словно с жемчужного ожерелья сорвали нить — галактики без тёмной материи застыли цепью. В группе NGC 1052 два газовых облака столкнулись лоб в лоб: тёмный каркас пролетел насквозь, а звёздные бусины остались. «Уэбб» случайно запечатлел эту сцену, охотясь на убегающую чёрную дыру. Теперь астрономы видят в этих сиротах ключ к разгадке тёмной материи.

title: Dark matter free-streaming length measured using 28 JWST gravitational lenses
oneliner: Observations of 28 gravitationally lensed quasars by JWST have constrained the free-streaming length of dark matter particles and confirmed the predictions of cold dark matter.
description: Using JWST data for 28 quadruply lensed quasar systems, astronomers measured a key parameter of dark matter models—the free-streaming length, which depends on the mass and formation mechanism of its particles. Joint analysis of image positions, relative brightnesses, and extended arcs suppressed unc
threads: Чтобы взвесить невидимое, астрономы превратили 28 далёких квазаров в космические микроскопы. Каждая расщеплённая дуга — слепок с тысяч тёмных сгустков. Вердикт: тёмная материя холодна, тяжела и чертит Вселенную без дрожи. Ни одной помарки. Но следующий шаг — проверить, не дрогнет ли рука, когда мы включим увеличение на полную.

title: Magnetic Pumping: How Plasma Pulsations Accelerate Particles to Ultra-Relativistic Energies
oneliner: Numerical simulations show that compression-expansion cycles in magnetized plasma can efficiently generate power-law energy spectra of particles, consistent with the generalized maximum entropy principle.
description: Astrophysical plasma with a high beta parameter often exhibits non-thermal particle distributions, the origin of which is debated. In a new study, for the first time, fully kinetic simulation was used to investigate particle acceleration in plasma undergoing cyclic compression and expansion. It is s
abstract: This work proposes a new 'pulsating box' configuration to study particle acceleration in high-beta plasma undergoing compression-expansion cycles. Fully kinetic simulations demonstrate efficient particle acceleration via magnetic pumping, forming non-thermal energy distributions with power-law tails. A generalized maximum entropy model is derived, linking the power-law index of the distribution to the injected energy; numerical results are in excellent agreement with the model. The results are significant for explaining the origin of high-energy particles in cosmic and astrophysical plasma — from turbulent regions of the interstellar medium to relativistic outflows.
threads: Магнитная накачка превращает пульсации плазмы в природный ускоритель. Каждый цикл сжатия, как удар кузнечного меха, вбивает в частицы порцию энергии. За 5–10 циклов электроны разгоняются до скоростей, близких к световой. Этот механизм объясняет потоки частиц от магнитосферы Земли до скоплений галактик. Похоже, Вселенная использует простой ритм, чтобы создавать самые быстрые объекты в природе.

title: Heavy Paleodetectors for Hunting the Higgsino: How Ancient Minerals Reveal the Secrets of Dark Matter
oneliner: Using ancient lead-based minerals allows detecting elusive inelastic dark matter particles, including the higgsino.
description: Dark matter remains one of the greatest mysteries of modern physics. A new study proposes a revolutionary method for direct detection of dark matter particles — paleodetectors based on heavy elements. Scientists have shown that ancient minerals, such as laurionite, containing lead, can accumulate tr
abstract: Heavy-element paleo-detectors are proposed for the direct detection of inelastic dark matter, using the higgsino as a benchmark. Existing paleo-detector methods lacked sufficiently heavy nuclei to overcome the kinematic scattering threshold. Suitable minerals may be sourced from ancient low-background sediments (e.g., lead-rich) from deep geothermal brines. The method shows enhanced sensitivity to the high-velocity tail of the dark matter distribution, particularly to a possible fast-particle stream triggered by a close passage of the Large Magellanic Cloud ~50 Myr ago, making younger samples preferable. Accessible higgsino mass splittings range up to δ≈920 keV. Due to the large higgsino-nucleon scattering cross-section, even samples with typical background levels from depths of only 2 km can probe new parameter space, partially relaxing the strict requirements on radio-purity and depth that are critical for the paleo-detector program.
threads: Кристаллы лаурионита — это природные свинцовые пластины, десятилетиями экспонировавшиеся потоком тёмной материи. Ионный микроскоп теперь проявляет скрытое изображение. Впервые можно поймать хиггсино — кандидата, ускользавшего от земных детекторов. Это космическая криминалистика: вещественными доказательствами служат целые минералы.

title: Quasar WISSH13: Ultra-Fast Winds from the Cosmic Noon Era
oneliner: X-ray observations reveal record outflows at up to 0.3c, uncovering the mechanics of super-Eddington accretion in the early Universe.
description: Deep observations of quasar WISSH13 (z=3.294) with XMM-Newton and NuSTAR revealed two components of ultra-fast outflows (UFOs) at speeds of ~0.1c and ~0.3c, detected via iron absorption lines. Continuum modeling points to a cool corona (kTe~20 keV) and strong reflection, typical for accretion near t
abstract: First results from the WISSHFUL program target bright quasars at the Cosmic Noon. Combined XMM-Newton and NuSTAR data for the super-Eddington quasar WISSH13 (z=3.294) delivered the finest broadband X-ray spectrum to date for a non-lensed quasar at such a redshift. Continuum modeling revealed a soft photon index (Γ~2), strong reflection (R~1.4–1.8) with a weak narrow iron line, and a low high-energy cutoff (E_cut~60–80 keV, kTe~15–20 keV). Most notably, two absorption lines at ~7.5 and ~10 keV (rest frame) were detected with 96.7% and 98.9% confidence, interpreted as a blueshifted blend of Fe XXV Heα and Fe XXVI Lyα. They indicate two kinematic components of highly ionized ultra-fast outflow (UFO) at ~0.1c and ~0.3c. The slower wind persisted in archival 2017 data, while the fast one emerged only in 2024, showcasing a layered and variable structure.
threads: 12 миллиардов лет назад чёрная дыра, пожирая материю, выбросила ветры со скоростью в треть световой. Эти потоки, как рука космического дирижёра, остановили рост гигантской галактики. Сегодня мы улавливаем эхо того катаклизма и начинаем понимать: возможно, именно так Вселенная регулирует появление новых звёзд. И, кто знает, жизнь на планетах тоже зависит от этих невидимых штормов.

title: Gravitational Waves from Strings Reveal the Secrets of the Axion and Flavors
oneliner: A unified theory of the axion and flavors predicts a distinctive gravitational-wave signal with a plateau-dip, opening a new window into the physics of the early Universe.
description: The Standard Model faces two puzzles: the strong CP problem and the hierarchy of fermion masses. The paper proposes a model where a gauge flavor symmetry simultaneously solves both, yielding a high-quality axion (flaxion). Cosmic strings arising from spontaneous symmetry breaking radiate gravitation
abstract: Axions from the anomalous global Peccei–Quinn symmetry resolve the strong CP problem but are susceptible to Planck-scale suppressed operators. A gauged abelian flavor symmetry U(1)_F, introduced to account for mass hierarchies via the Froggatt–Nielsen mechanism, shields the axion, yielding an accidentally high-quality flavored axion with a domain wall number of one. The model predicts two complementary signals: flavor-changing currents in K→π a decays (typical for flavor scales Λ_FN ≳ f_a) and stochastic gravitational waves from the evolution and decay of networks of gauged flavor and axion cosmic strings. Global axion strings efficiently radiate axions, potentially explaining the observed dark matter density. The gravitational-wave spectrum acquires a “plateau–valley” structure—a powerful and characteristic probe for high-quality flavored axion dark matter models, supplementing low-energy flavor experiments.
threads: Гравитационные волны не просто рябь — это партитура ранней Вселенной. В ней может скрываться провал: внезапное молчание, вызванное перерождением космических струн в эпоху КХД. Словно скрипичная струна, лопнув, заставляет оркестр умолкнуть на мгновение, так и струна аромата, лишившись взаимодействия с аксионом, меняет характер излучения. Детектор LISA, возможно, расслышит эту паузу из времён, когда Вселенной было всего несколько микросекунд, — и тогда мы узнаем, откуда берутся

title: Strong emission lines [OIII]+Hβ as the main source of ionizing radiation during the epoch of reionization
oneliner: Galaxies with extremely powerful [OIII] and Hβ lines provide up to 70% of the ionizing photons needed to complete the reionization of the Universe at z≈7.
description: Using ultra-deep JWST images and gravitational lensing by the cluster Abell 2744, a population of compact galaxies with an equivalent width of [OIII]+Hβ >740 Å was identified. Detailed NIRSpec spectroscopy confirmed their high ionization efficiency and an almost complete lack of dust. By integrating
abstract: Ultra-deep UNCOVER F410M data and gravitational lensing allowed us to deepen the survey of [OIII]+Hβ emitters in the Abell 2744 field by an order of magnitude, reaching log(L_[OIII]+Hβ/erg s⁻¹)=41.3. The galaxies selected by lines are young, with minimal dust and metal content. NIRSpec confirmation (18 objects, 72% success rate) showed zero reddening and metallicity 12+log(O/H)=6.8–7.7. The average [OII]/[OIII]=0.054±0.007 gives f_esc≈20%. These emitters make up 56±12% of the UV population, and their ionizing budget (log(ṅ_ion/s⁻¹Mpc⁻³)=50.63±0.05) covers ~70% of the reionization requirement at z~7. The [OIII]+Hβ sample is insensitive to dust and shows that known galaxy populations make the main contribution to reionization.
threads: Вселенский рассвет наступил не стараниями гигантов, а усилиями крохотных галактик-искр. Их эмиссионные линии били словно космические прожекторы, превращая водородный океан в прозрачную плазму. Сегодня телескопы видят эти фабрики фотонов на z~7 — они поставляли до 70% ионизующего излучения. Никакой пыли, никакой экзотики: только первозданная физика.

title: High-Speed Interstellar Visitors: How Motion Across the Sky Hampers Their Discovery
oneliner: The fast angular motion of interstellar objects across the sky might be why we've only detected three of them so far.
description: Since the discovery of the first interstellar object 1I/'Oumuamua in 2017, astronomers have spotted only two others—2I/Borisov and 3I/ATLAS. Yet their very existence hints at a vast population of such bodies passing through the Solar System. A new study provides an analytical formula for computing t
abstract: Three interstellar objects have been discovered in the last decade, suggesting a larger population exists. The possibility that rapid motion across the sky hinders their discovery is investigated. An analytical solution is derived for the apparent angular motion of an object on an arbitrary orbit, which is more efficient than numerical methods. It is applied to estimate typical speeds as a function of orbit and limiting magnitude. Synthetic populations (~10^5 objects) are created in spheres of radii 1.2, 3.0, and 5.0 AU, and their motions are calculated for different magnitude thresholds. Brighter objects reach detection at lower speeds than faint ones, and comets at even lower speeds. The tails of the speed distributions exceed the discovery speed of 1I. Thus, the fastest and faintest interstellar bodies may escape registration, and their number in the Solar System is underestimated.
threads: Оумуамуа мчался по небосводу со скоростью 24 лунных диска в сутки — телескопы не успевали нажать на спуск. Мы замечаем только тех странников, что случайно притормаживают. Но именно на спокойных окраинах, где угловой бег замирает, скрывается архив межзвёздных тел. Новые обзоры прицельно просканируют эти медленные воды, и тогда каждый тусклый объект станет посылкой от далёкой звезды, несущей химическую подпись иной природы.

title: Running Vacuum in the Expanding Universe: A Unified Quantum Field Paradigm of Inflation and Dark Energy
oneliner: The Running Vacuum Model (RVM) explains inflation and dark energy as manifestations of quantum effects of matter fields in curved spacetime.
description: This review presents the Running Vacuum Model (RVM), based on quantum field theory in curved spacetime. Quantum fluctuations of matter generate a dynamic vacuum energy density that depends on the Hubble expansion rate. In the early universe, quartic ∼H^4 effects trigger inflation without an inflaton
abstract: Within the running vacuum model (RVM), grounded in quantum field theory in curved spacetime, the vacuum energy density ρvac = Λ/(8πG) depends on the Hubble parameter H and its derivatives: ρvac = ρvac(H, Ḣ, Ḧ, ...). In the present epoch, the evolution is extremely slow: δρvac ∼ O(mPl² H²), ensuring a dynamic dark energy. The gravitational constant G also varies, but only logarithmically: G = G(ln H). In the very early Universe, quantum fluctuations induce terms ∼ H⁴, triggering rapid inflation without the need for an inflaton field—this mechanism differs from Starobinsky inflation, where H is not constant. Thus, RVM provides a unified description of inflation and dark energy, and the dynamic vacuum aligns with the latest DESI data, which favors evolving dark energy over a static Λ.
threads: Космический вакуум — не немой фон, а дышащий океан. Его энергия пульсирует в ритме Хаббла: в младенчестве H⁴ раздуло космос, сегодня H² гонит галактики вдаль. Гравитационная «постоянная» дрейфует? Дирак был прав — и сверхточные часы готовы засвидетельствовать это дыхание.

title: New DESI Data Shifts the Local Value of the Hubble Constant
oneliner: DESI results hint at a possible evolution of dark energy, which could lower the locally measured Hubble constant by up to 2.5 km/s/Mpc.
description: Measurements of baryon acoustic oscillations (BAO) with the DESI spectroscopic instrument have revealed evidence of evolving dark energy. When analyzing local distance data within the w0wa cosmological models preferred by DESI, the Hubble constant value could be up to 2.5 km/s/Mpc lower than in the
abstract: Analysis of baryon acoustic oscillations (BAO) from DESI data reveals evidence for dark energy evolution. Using w0wa models favored by the DESI data reduces the local Hubble constant H0 by up to 2.5 km/s/Mpc relative to the ΛCDM estimate. When constraints from cosmic microwave background (CMB) and type Ia supernovae (SNIa) data are applied, the shift narrows: for DESI+CMB the reduction is 1.1 ± 0.38 km/s/Mpc, and for DESI+CMB+SNIa it is 0.5 ± 0.1 km/s/Mpc. The dependence of local H0 measurements on the cosmological background and the weak constraints on cosmology at low redshifts indicate the importance of this effect for the Hubble tension problem.
threads: От 500 до 73 — и снова вниз? Постоянная Хаббла оказалась с характером. Данные DESI намекают: тёмная энергия дирижирует расширением, замедляя темп. Возможно, это разрешит драму хаббловской напряжённости и перепишет космическую партитуру.

title: Ultraviolet uncertainty challenges biosignatures on TRAPPIST-1 e
oneliner: Different models of the ultraviolet spectrum of the star TRAPPIST-1 can create false signs of life on its planet e, including the simultaneous presence of methane and ozone.
description: The atmosphere of the exoplanet TRAPPIST-1 e, located in the habitable zone of an ultra-cool red dwarf, was modeled under conditions similar to Archean Earth. Scientists used a one-dimensional photochemical model to test how different reconstructions of the star's ultraviolet (UV) spectrum affect th
threads: Атмосфера экзопланеты — это оркестр, а ультрафиолет звезды — партитура. Одна смазанная нота, и мелодия жизни превращается в какофонию лживых сигналов. Для TRAPPIST-1 e разница в УФ-спектре всего в два порядка меняет концентрацию метана в тысячу раз. James Webb скоро сможет услышать эту музыку — если мы правильно настроим инструмент.

title: Swift Outflow from Quasar J2318: Relativistic Wind at 0.3c
oneliner: Astronomers have discovered the fastest ultraviolet outflow in quasar J2318, reaching nearly a third of the speed of light.
description: Quasar SDSS J231854.31+243954.2 (J2318) shows an extremely high-velocity outflow, seen in CIV and SiIV absorption lines at speeds up to 90,000 km/s. Over 2.2 years in the quasar's rest frame, the outflow monotonically strengthened. Black hole mass (1.65 billion solar masses) and mass loss rate (>0.8
abstract: We present the fastest known quasar outflow, discovered in the ultraviolet via variable absorption of C IV and Si IV ions at velocities from −77,000 to −90,000 km/s (≈0.3c) in the radio-quiet quasar SDSS J2318. Gemini GNIRS spectroscopy of the Hα line gives a redshift of z=2.6781; 20-year photometry shows peak variability of 0.5 mag in the g-band. Over ~2.2 years in the rest frame, C IV absorption increased monotonically. The existence of this outflow requires models that either accelerate gas to 0.3c while retaining C IV and Si IV, or produce these ions in situ within the already fast-moving gas. The virial black hole mass is 1.65×10⁹ M☉, with an Eddington ratio of 0.45. Under conservative assumptions, the mass-loss rate in the UV outflow alone exceeds 0.82 M☉/yr, and the ratio of kinetic to bolometric luminosity L_kin/L_bol ≥ 0.75%, exceeding the threshold for significant galactic feedback. Comparison with PDS 456 suggests these values could be two orders of magnitude higher.
threads: В центре почти каждой галактики тлеет древний огонь. В J2318 он разгорелся так, что исторгает газ на трети скорости света. Этот космический ураган выметает прочь сырьё для новых звёзд. Но как газ остаётся холодным на таких скоростях? Разгадка спрятана на стыке астрофизики и физики плазмы. Мы только начинаем прислушиваться к вою этих ветров — и, возможно, по их шуму восстановим биографию галактик.

title: Micronova in IGR J17014-4306: A New Thermonuclear Explosion on a White Dwarf
oneliner: An optical micronova explosion has been detected in the intermediate polar IGR J17014-4306, confirming the model of localized thermonuclear burning on white dwarfs.
description: Data from NASA’s TESS space telescope captured a micronova flare — a thermonuclear explosion confined by the magnetic field of an accretion column on a white dwarf. The event in the IGR J17014-4306 system lasted 1.56 days, reached a peak luminosity of 9.3×10³³ erg/s, and released an energy of 3.25×1
threads: Белый карлик крадёт каплю водорода у соседней звезды. Магнитное поле скручивает её в фитиль, который загорается каждые 20 дней. Это микронова — взрыв в миллион раз слабее классической новой, но ключ к тому, как магнитные поля дирижируют ядерным горением от белых карликов до нейтронных звёзд.

title: Detection of Tidal Resonances in Neutron Stars with the Einstein Telescope
oneliner: The Einstein Telescope will be able to detect tidal resonances in neutron stars, ushering in a new era of gravitational-wave asteroseismology.
description: This study presents the first complete Bayesian analysis of the future gravitational-wave detector the Einstein Telescope's ability to detect resonant excitation of oscillation modes in binary neutron stars. By simulating a year of observations and analyzing the 200 loudest signals, the authors foun
abstract: During neutron star mergers, the increasing tidal frequency resonantly excites oscillation modes, which serve as a seismological tool to probe internal structure. We performed the first fully Bayesian study of the Einstein Telescope's ability to detect tidal resonances: we simulated one year of observations and analyzed the 200 loudest signals. We found that the detector can identify resonant modes and is sensitive to gravitational-wave phase shifts on the order of ΔΦ≈0.03 for favorable events. Neglecting the resonances leads to biased estimates of tidal deformability. These results establish tidal resonances as a measurable asteroseismology method via future detectors.
threads: Нейтронные звёзды не безмолвны: в гравитационных волнах они оставляют следы своих резонансных нот. Телескоп Эйнштейна уловит фазовые сдвиги в 0.03 радиана — словно один инструмент в оркестре слияния вдруг зазвенел в такт. Это не просто шум, а ключ к веществу при ядерных плотностях. Так астросейсмология научится слушать звёзды.

title: Neutrino flare from supernova SN 2021foa: first robust signal of high-energy neutrinos from an interacting supernova
oneliner: Analysis of IceCube neutrino observatory data revealed a neutrino burst coinciding with the optical peak of the nearby supernova SN 2021foa, for the first time directly linking collapsing supernovae with the production of high-energy neutrinos.
description: An international team of scientists reported the detection of a neutrino flare from supernova SN 2021foa—one of the nearest and brightest interacting type IIn supernovae. Using IceCube muon track data, researchers found a clustering of four neutrino events within ~6 days, spatially and temporally co
threads: Четыре нейтрино — четыре ноты в симфонии гибели звезды. Пока сверхновая полыхала в оптике, её ядро говорило на языке почти неуловимых частиц. Энергия этого шёпота в сто раз превзошла видимый пожар — как если бы за занавеской бушевал ураган, а в зал долетал лишь шорох. Скоро нейтринные телескопы превратят такие шёпоты в громкие голоса, и мы услышим, как умирают гиганты.

title: Short gravitational waves as a tool for searching for cosmic domain walls
oneliner: The study tests the topological dark matter hypothesis based on domain walls for the anomalous short gravitational-wave events GW190521 and GW231123.
description: Scientists analyzed the short gravitational-wave transients GW190521 and GW231123 within the topological dark matter model, which assumes the passage of cosmic domain walls through LIGO detectors. Bayesian comparison favored the black hole merger model, but with significantly less confidence than ex
abstract: Gravitational-wave transients GW190521 and GW231123, interpreted as mergers of very massive black holes, were tested against the topological dark-matter model with domain walls. Fitting the wall template to LIGO data favored the black-hole hypothesis with log Bayes factors of 12.2 and 11.3, which is lower than values obtained when injecting black-hole signals into noise. A joint analysis was performed for the first time, where both events simultaneously constrain the parameters of a single scalar field; although black holes remain preferred, the events are compatible with a common field, and the wall parameters agree for independent noise realizations and sky locations. Injected wall transients were systematically recovered as black holes with high spins, indicating morphological degeneracy. Multi-event parameter-consistency tests offer a new tool for searching for domain walls in future observing runs of gravitational-wave observatories.
threads: Два загадочных гравитационных всплеска, пойманных LIGO, возможно, были не слияниями чёрных дыр. Сквозь Землю могли проскользнуть космические «стены» — дефекты пространства, оставшиеся от рождения Вселенной. Они исказили свет в детекторах всего на долю секунды. Если таких событий накопится достаточно, мы докажем, что тёмная материя — это полевая рябь, а не частицы. Физика на пороге расшифровки самого тихого шёпота мироздания.

title: Quasistars: A Model to Explain Mysterious 'Little Red Dots'
oneliner: A quasistar model with a dense gas envelope successfully reproduces the spectra of mysterious early-universe objects discovered by the James Webb Space Telescope.
description: Recently discovered by JWST, 'Little Red Dots' (LRDs) challenge standard models of supermassive black hole growth. In a new study, astrophysicists tested the hypothesis that LRDs are quasistars—objects where an accreting black hole is surrounded by a dense envelope that fully thermalizes the radiati
threads: Внутри гигантской звезды прячется чёрная дыра — ключ к «Маленьким красным точкам». Словно в космической печи, газовый кокон переплавляет жёсткое излучение в привычные спектры. Если гипотеза верна, мы смотрим в эпоху, когда Вселенная запускала свои первые гравитационные двигатели.

title: Anisotropic Ion Heating in the Footpoints of Solar Flares
oneliner: Analysis of thousands of Hinode spectra reveals that iron line broadening is directed along the magnetic field, pointing to non-equilibrium ion temperatures.
description: Spectral lines in the footpoints of solar flares are broadened more than can be explained by the electron temperature. An international team analyzed 4,593 observations of 407 flares from the Hinode spacecraft and for the first time robustly demonstrated that plasma motion along the magnetic field m
abstract: To investigate the nature of the excess broadening of spectral lines at the footpoints of solar flares (far exceeding the thermal width based on electron temperature), a study of 4593 Hinode/EIS spectra from 407 C- and M-class flares was conducted. A systematic decrease in line width from the disk center to the limb was found in all coronal emission lines, proving that the dominant broadening mechanism is associated with motion along the magnetic field, not an isotropic or transverse component. Lines formed at ~1 MK retain significant broadening in the early decay phase, indicating prolonged unresolved flows or line-of-sight velocity gradients. Hotter lines (~5–10 MK) show a rapid decline in broadening after the soft X-ray peak, consistent with short-lived selective ion heating and temperature anisotropy (T_parallel > T_perp). These results settle the long-standing question about the dominant broadening process, impose direct constraints on flare energetics, and set the direction for model development that includes separate ion temperatures along and across the magnetic field, exceeding the electron temperature.
threads: В солнечной вспышке ионы разогреваются до десятков миллионов градусов, но жар распределён неравномерно. Подобно муравьиной колонне, они мчатся вдоль магнитных линий, тогда как поперёк — прохладно. Электроны же, словно отставшие туристы, остаются позади по температуре. Это нарушение теплового «равноправия» приближает нас к разгадке магнитного пересоединения — процесса, от которого зависит судьба атмосфер далёких планет.

title: Determining the Neutrino Mass Hierarchy from the Next Galactic Supernova
oneliner: The neutrino signal from a future massive star explosion in the Milky Way will allow us to establish whether neutrino masses are normally or inversely ordered.
description: The next galactic supernova will provide a unique opportunity to determine the neutrino mass hierarchy—one of the key unsolved problems in physics. The study analyzes two main observable signals: the neutronization burst of electron neutrinos and the rise time of the electron antineutrino flux durin
abstract: The next galactic core-collapse supernova will provide a unique opportunity to determine the neutrino mass ordering. Two observable signals are analyzed: the neutronization burst of electron neutrinos (a sharp peak over ~20–30 ms) and the rise time of the electron antineutrino flux during the accretion phase. The neutronization burst is nearly model-independent and gives a clear distinction via its presence or absence. Realistic simulations for several progenitor masses with event calculations for the DUNE, Hyper-Kamiokande, and JUNO detectors at a distance of 10 kpc yield sensitivities of >6σ (DUNE) and >4σ (Hyper-K) for discriminating normal and inverted hierarchy. For the rise time, to circumvent progenitor-dependent degeneracies, cumulative and ratio-based observables at characteristic times of 20 ms and 100 ms are used, giving confidence levels of ~5σ (Hyper-K) and ~3σ (JUNO). The combined use of the neutronization burst and accretion-phase data from different detectors will be crucial for an unambiguous determination of the neutrino mass ordering from the next supernova.
threads: Один взрыв в нашей Галактике — и Землю омывает нейтринный ливень из 10⁵⁸ частиц. Почти все пролетят навылет, но единичные удары по детекторам принесут ответ на вопрос, который десятилетиями мучает физиков: в каком порядке находятся массы трёх типов нейтрино? Как три струны разного натяжения, они отзовутся на катаклизм по-своему — пиком в одной тональности или плавным нарастанием в другой. Этот космический камертон, возможно, уже на пути к нам, и когда он зазвучит, мы наконец

title: Dark Start: How Vacuum Decay Gave Birth to the Big Bang
oneliner: A new mechanism for the birth of the hot Universe: inflation heats up the dark sector, and the Standard Model is triggered by the quantum decay of a false vacuum.
description: In an alternative early-Universe scenario, after inflation, all energy goes into the dark sector, leaving ordinary particles in a metastable state. When Hubble expansion slows, quantum tunneling triggers a phase transition with nucleation of true-vacuum bubbles. The bubble walls accelerate to coloss
threads: После инфляции Вселенная была тёмной и холодной, как переохлаждённая жидкость в колбе. Расширение замедлилось — и квантовый щелчок породил лавину пузырей истинного вакуума, чьи стенки разгонялись почти до скорости света. Их столкновения высекли гравитационно-волновой гул — эхо того первого «вскрытия», которое, возможно, донесётся до наших детекторов.

title: Direct merger waves: a new test of Hawking's area theorem for black holes
oneliner: Analysis of direct gravitational waves from the GW250114 merger confirms the law of non-decreasing black hole horizon area.
description: Scientists applied a new method to measure the black hole horizon area using direct gravitational waves that emerge right after the merger, before the quasi-normal ringing sets in. Using the event GW250114, they show that the area estimate from direct waves agrees with the Kerr remnant area, providi
abstract: A method is proposed for gravitational-wave measurement of the horizon area, equivalent to the Kerr area, based on analyzing direct waves in the signal of a close merger before the quasi-normal ringing stage. Applied to GW250114, the measured frequency and damping rate of the direct wave are treated as horizon properties. The analysis, starting 3–4.5M (M being the total mass of the system) before the amplitude peak, yields an area consistent with a Kerr remnant. This is the first area measurement from direct waves and a new test of Hawking's area increase law in the pre-merger regime.
threads: Слияние чёрных дыр — это гравитационный крик рождения. В первые миллисекунды вспыхивают прямые волны, как рябь от удара камня о воду, неся точные параметры горизонта: вращение и силу тяжести. Для GW250114 они показали: площадь новорождённой дыры — 40 000 км², и закон Хокинга незыблем. Возможно, в этих сигналах однажды проявится квантовый запах энтропии.

title: Cosmic Dust Explains Color Variations in Type Ia Supernovae: A Breakthrough in Standardization
oneliner: ZTF DR2 data showed that the observed correlation between color and brightness of Type Ia supernovae is entirely due to interstellar dust, not the internal properties of the explosion.
description: An international team led by Marco Giunta (SISSA) applied a Bayesian hierarchical model to a uniform sample of 902 Type Ia supernovae from the Zwicky Transient Facility survey. The analysis showed that the intrinsic color dispersion of supernovae is negligibly small, and the primary factor for redde
abstract: The question of the ratio of intrinsic color variability of Type Ia supernovae to dust reddening is important for cosmology. Analysis of ZTF DR2 and Foundation DR1 data with the Simple-BayeSN model revealed that the traditional rejection of red objects introduces a selection bias. Accounting for this effect shows that the entire color–brightness correlation is explained by dust, without the need for intrinsic variability. The result is independent of the host galaxy mass or distance from its center. Conclusion: the Tripp linear correction remains empirically correct, but its action is due to dust, not intrinsic supernova properties.
threads: Пыль, застилающая далёкие звёзды, десятилетиями считалась досадной помехой. Но новые данные ZTF перевернули картину: именно она превращает сверхновые в идеальные маяки. Чем толще слой пыли на пути света, тем точнее он отмеряет расстояния до края Вселенной. Как если бы шум оказался ключом к шифру. Теперь LSST поставит эти пыльные подписи на поток, и мы, возможно, увидим истинное лицо тёмной энергии. Грязь, которая стала инструментом.

title: JWST Reveals the Feeding Secrets of Black Holes in Galaxy Centers
oneliner: James Webb’s observations showed how multi-component gas filaments connect to a circumnuclear disk, funneling matter onto a supermassive black hole.
description: New JWST/NIRSpec data on galaxy NGC 4696 in the Centaurus cluster have for the first time resolved the kinematics of ionized gas within the black hole’s sphere of influence. It turns out that the S-shaped structure previously seen in Hubble images is a rotating, multiphase circumnuclear disk with a
abstract: Observations of NGC 4696 with the JWST's NIRSpec instrument at a resolution of 10 pc over a 618×618 pc field revealed that the ionized spiral in Hα emission is a rotating multiphase circumnuclear disk (CND). The disk is physically and kinematically connected to a large-scale network of filaments, bridging the gap between cooling flows on kiloparsec scales and accretion onto the black hole within 100 pc. Magnetohydrodynamic simulations reproduce the morphology and kinematics: gas condenses from the hot atmosphere, loses angular momentum, and feeds the CND, which directs material toward the black hole. A similar structure in NGC 1275 (Perseus Cluster) points to a common mechanism for systems with radio-mode feedback: multiphase filaments transport gas to the black hole via the CND, closing the self-regulation loop of galaxy evolution.
threads: В центре галактики NGC 4696 обнаружена система, похожая на баньяновое дерево. Газовые нити, словно воздушные корни, простираются на сотни парсеков, чтобы питать вращающийся диск вокруг сверхмассивной чёрной дыры. До сих пор не удавалось проследить этот путь — JWST впервые увидел непрерывную кинематическую связь. Теперь ясно: чёрные дыры не просто всасывают всё вокруг, а получают вещество через упорядоченные структуры. Такой же мост найден в галактике NGC 1275, значит, это уни

title: Ultraviolet repaints the hazes: how stellar flares change the look of water worlds
oneliner: Lab experiments show that ultraviolet radiation from stellar flares alters the optical properties of hazes in the atmospheres of water exoplanets, which telescopes might spot.
description: Scientists recreated lab versions of the hazes typical of water-rich sub-Neptune atmospheres and blasted them with ultraviolet light mimicking flares from red dwarfs. Measurements showed that after irradiation, the haze particles become more absorbing in the infrared, especially if they contain meth
abstract: We experimentally obtained optical constants of haze analogs for sub-Neptunes before and after UV irradiation across a wide wavelength range (0.5–8 µm). It was found that UV exposure makes the haze generally more absorbing, likely due to the appearance of oxygen-containing absorption bands. Using climate models Virga and PICASO, we computed transmission spectra of potentially water-rich planets GJ 1214b and LHS 1140b, taking into account irradiated haze layers. For a methane-rich haze on GJ 1214b, we predict a difference in the N-H band at 2.6 µm between the irradiated and pristine samples, observable with JWST. The results highlight the importance of using realistic haze optical constants for accurate interpretation of current and future data on exoplanet atmospheric composition.
threads: Завёрнутые в фольгу, словно тайные ингредиенты, образцы инопланетных дымок дожидаются своего часа в лаборатории. Ультрафиолетовый удар звезды-хозяйки перекрашивает их, и телескоп ловит этот цветовой аккорд. Когда-нибудь такие тонкие оттенки укажут на обитаемые миры, заставляя нас по-новому взглянуть на каждый мерцающий красный карлик.

title: Where Not to Look: A Parametric Filter to Exclude Uninhabitable Stars in SETI
oneliner: A new catalog excludes over half of Gaia stars as poorly suited for complex life, leaving about 778 thousand priority targets for the search for extraterrestrial intelligence.
description: In the search for extraterrestrial intelligence (SETI), allocating precious telescope time among billions of stars is critical. This work presents a rule-based model that, based on seven stellar parameters—mass, age, metallicity, spectral type, multiplicity, photometric variability, and red dwarf ac
abstract: A simple rule-based filter for SETI target selection is presented, using seven stellar parameters (age, metallicity, multiplicity, etc.). The filter excludes stars unlikely to host complex life and generates an exclusion catalog. From the Gaia DR3 sample of 1.74 million stars, about half are excluded; 777,835 priority targets are retained, predominantly G- and K-dwarfs. The main contributions to exclusions come from age and metallicity. Notably, replacing point age estimates with upper limits from Gaia preserves 355,086 stars. Comparison of empirical and synthetic proxies shows robustness of the overall exclusion rate but significant changes in individual assignments; for example, the RUWE indicator reveals 2.7 times more binary systems than the Gaia non-single-star flag. Cross-matching with the Breakthrough Listen target list yields 56.5% exclusions, highlighting complementarity of surveys focused on habitability and proximity. The catalog, pipeline, and a generalized community tool are publicly available.
threads: Больше половины из 1,7 млн звёзд Gaia признаны бесплодными. Астрофизический фильтр, как сито старателя, отбросил молодые и бедные металлами светила, оставив 778 тысяч. Это просеивание превращает Великий Фильтр из метафоры в измеримый рубеж. Тишина эфира больше не гнетёт — она показывает, куда смотреть. Быть может, сигнал всё это время ждал, пока мы перестанем рыскать вслепую и начнём промывать правильные слои.

title: Tidal Disruption of Blanets in Kerr Spacetime: From Test Particles to Planetary-Mass Bodies
oneliner: How supermassive black holes tear apart blanet planets in active galactic nuclei, and how this differs from stellar disruption.
description: Disks in active galactic nuclei may host blanets—planetary-mass bodies (20–3000 M⊕). When approaching a supermassive black hole, they are torn apart by tidal forces, producing flares with unique features: durations from hours to weeks, optical-ultraviolet emission, and brightness decay following t^-
threads: В огненной реке аккреционного диска рождаются бланеты. Поток несёт их к чёрной дыре, где приливные силы разрывают на части. Вспышка на несколько дней затмевает галактику. Мы ещё не видели ни одной такой гибели, но телескопы нового поколения скоро услышат эхо этих катаклизмов и, возможно, расшифруют танец пространства-времени.

title: The Hybrid Nature of a PeVatron: How Pulsar J1849-0001 Powers Record Gamma-Ray Emission
oneliner: Observations from the LHAASO observatory revealed a hybrid mechanism for generating gamma-ray photons up to 2 PeV from source J1849-0002, making it a candidate accelerator of cosmic rays.
description: Astrophysicists studied the source LHAASO J1849-0002, associated with the pulsar PSR J1849-0001, and proposed a self-consistent hybrid model of its emission. A combination of inverse Compton scattering of relativistic electrons and hadronic collisions of protons in a nearby molecular cloud explains
threads: Природный ускоритель частиц, спрятанный в плоскости Галактики, оказался в 200 раз мощнее Большого адронного коллайдера. Пульсар PSR J1849-0001 работает как гибридный оркестр: электроны играют на реликтовом излучении, а протоны — на молекулярном облаке, создавая гамма-симфонию в 2 ПэВ. Эта находка приближает нас к разгадке происхождения самых энергичных космических лучей и сулит открытие десятков подобных объектов в будущем.

title: The Phantom Periodic Radio Burst: How a Pulsar Fooled CHIME Astronomers
oneliner: A signal registered in 2022 as a periodic fast radio burst actually came from a known galactic pulsar—a rare telescope calibration error caused the mix-up.
description: In December 2019, the CHIME telescope picked up an unusual signal—FRB 20191221A, which had a distinct periodicity of 217 ms, making it unique among fast radio bursts. Later, however, it turned out to be a series of pulses from the galactic pulsar PSR J0248+6021, mislocalized 20 degrees to the south.
threads: Пульсар пульсирует каждые 217 миллисекунд. Но однажды его сигнал раздвоился, словно отражение в треснувшей призме, и породил призрачный двойник — идеального кандидата в периодические быстрые радиовсплески. Так дождь над телескопом CHIME едва не изменил астрономические каталоги. Теперь алгоритмы ищут подобные трещины, чтобы не спутать космический мираж с настоящим открытием.

title: Freo Doctor: How the Wind Controls the Fate of Meteorites
oneliner: High-resolution atmospheric modeling reveals the critical uncertainty that wind introduces into predicting meteorite fall locations.
description: A meteorite's fall is not just a fiery streak across the sky, but also a complex dance with atmospheric currents. How can we accurately predict where a cosmic wanderer will land? A team of scientists led by A. R. Devillepoix and M. Cupák conducted large-scale modeling of the lower 30 km of the atmos
threads: Фрео Доктор — прохладный бриз Перта — управляет охотой на метеориты. Ветер смещает космические камни на сотни метров от расчётной точки: 10-граммовый осколок может упасть в неожиданном месте, и лишь точный расчёт воздушных потоков позволяет его найти. Моделирование 1107 атмосферных сценариев уже привело к 12 находкам. Возможно, будущие метеоритные поиски сравнятся по точности с посадкой марсоходов. А пока каждый найденный метеорит — это послание из времён, когда Солнечная сис

title: The Riddle of Early Galaxies: A Non-Standard Perturbation Spectrum Explains JWST's Findings
oneliner: A new cosmological model featuring a ‘bump’ and a cutoff in the density perturbation spectrum resolves the tension between the abundance of massive galaxies at z>10 and the epoch of reionization.
description: The JWST space telescope has discovered an unexpectedly high number of massive galaxies at redshifts z~10 and above, which doesn’t fit well with the standard ΛCDM model. The study proposes a spectrum of initial perturbations with a local enhancement (a ‘bump’) on a scale of ~10^10 M⊙ and suppression
abstract: The study resolves the discrepancy between the overabundance of galaxies at z≥10 detected by JWST and the standard ΛCDM model. It examines a scenario with a bump (peak) in the perturbation power spectrum at a scale of ~10¹⁰ M⊙, which, however, pushes the reionization epoch too far into the past. It is shown that adding suppression on smaller scales (by reducing the amplitude of primordial fluctuations or introducing warm dark matter) decreases the number of low-mass halos and, consequently, the amount of ionizing UV radiation, removing the contradiction. Using the extended Press-Schechter (EPS) formalism, the distribution of halo merger rates in the presence of the bump is derived and verified through direct N-body simulations. Based on this distribution and the assumption that mergers trigger starbursts, the UV luminosity function of early galaxies is computed, matching observational data. In this model, the fraction of galaxies forming through a monolithic mechanism (single large-scale collapse) increases significantly, and the first stars emerge directly in halos with masses ≥10⁸ M⊙, termed 'Population IV stars' (possessing primordial chemical composition).
threads: Телескоп «Джеймс Уэбб» видит в ранней Вселенной слишком много взрослых галактик — как будто оркестр заиграл финал прежде дирижёра. Разгадка — микроскопический «горб» в спектре изначальной ряби: природа взяла одну ноту чуть громче, и галактики-гиганты родились раньше срока. Это не просто латание теории, а первая зацепка, связывающая квантовые флуктуации инфляции с рождением исполинских звёздных систем. Будущие обзоры неба обещают превратить гипотезу в новую реальность.

title: Primordial Black Holes as Dark Matter and Triggers of Type Ia Supernovae
oneliner: Asteroid-like primordial black holes can trigger white dwarf explosions, birthing Type Ia supernovae and shaping the chemical evolution of galaxies.
description: The study models metallicity-dependent explosions of white dwarfs triggered by capture of a primordial black hole (PBH) from dark matter. Using hydrodynamic simulations and post-process nucleosynthesis, scientists showed that such Type Ia supernovae can explain observed light curves and supernova re
abstract: Primordial black holes with asteroid-like masses (4×10⁻¹⁷–4×10⁻¹² M⊙) are dark matter candidates. Accreting onto white dwarfs, they can ignite Type Ia supernovae. We develop explosion scenarios for a range of metallicities (heavy element content). These scenarios successfully reproduce recent observations of light curves and supernova remnants. The impact of these events on galactic chemical evolution is examined: models incorporating this new element source explain observed trends and allow us to estimate the contribution of the PBH-supernova channel relative to the canonical one (thermonuclear explosions in binary systems). We conclude that PBH-induced supernovae may have dominated in the early Universe. The influence of explosion parameters on chemical trends is also investigated.
threads: Астероид-призрак пронзает звезду — и та вспыхивает ярче ста миллиардов солнц. Возможно, первичные чёрные дыры не только скрываются в тёмной материи, но и служат запалом для белых карликов. Их невидимые росчерки хранит химическая летопись звёзд. Однажды, расшифровав её, мы нанесём на карту само незримое.

title: GJ 3929 b: Key to Unlocking the Atmospheres of Rocky Exoplanets
oneliner: JWST data suggest that the warm Earth-like exoplanet GJ 3929 b most likely lacks a dense atmosphere, but a thin veil of gas hasn’t been ruled out.
description: JWST observations as part of the Rocky Worlds DDT survey have measured the eclipse depth of exoplanet GJ 3929 b with unprecedented precision. Analysis of four secondary eclipses using the FN-PCA method yielded a value of 118±22 ppm, corresponding to a dayside brightness temperature of 641+59-64 K. T
abstract: As part of the Rocky Worlds DDT survey, transit eclipse observations of exoplanet GJ 3929 b (1.75 Earth masses, 17.3 Earth insolations) were carried out with the MIRI camera on JWST at 15 microns. From the complete data of four visits (two previously unpublished), the eclipse depth was measured at 118±22 ppm and the brightness temperature of the dayside hemisphere at 641+59/-64 K. This value is lower than previously reported (160+26/-27 ppm) based on the first two observations. The results are compatible with both a bare rocky surface and a thin atmosphere; thick CO₂ atmospheres without thermal inversion are ruled out with >3σ confidence. Additionally, it is shown that the FN-PCA method is more robust to the choice of extraction aperture size than standard polynomial detrending, which is critical for the reliability of the conclusions.
threads: Голый камень, остывающий за секунды после заката — так выглядит планета, с которой звезда-кузнец сорвала атмосферу. Телескоп Джеймс Уэбб измерил тепло от GJ 3929 b: плотной оболочки нет, лишь эхо от горячего дневного полушария. Пустыня, где нет убежища для жизни. Но переменчивость сигнала намекает: быть может, трепещет разреженный газ. Такие миры — пограничные столбы на космической береговой линии. Они укажут, где в Галактике стоит искать биомаркеры.

title: Clumps in a Cocoon: Geometry and Mixing Give Rise to a Universal Glow
oneliner: Why is the ratio of X-ray to H-alpha brightness in galactic winds and jellyfish tails always around three?
description: Across a wide range of astrophysical systems—from galactic winds to jellyfish tails and cluster filaments—a surprising constancy is observed: the ratio of surface brightness in X-rays to H-alpha is about 3. This is odd, because H-alpha comes from cool gas (~10,000 K), while X-rays come from hot gas
abstract: Observations of galactic winds, ram-pressure-stripped tails, and cluster filaments show a universal X-ray-to-Hα surface brightness ratio near 3. Hα is emitted by cool gas (10⁴ K), while X-rays come from hot gas (10⁶–10⁷ K). Plane-parallel mixing layer models fail to reproduce this ratio. Using 3D simulations at high density contrast (χ~10³), we show that the cool phase shatters into Hα-emitting clumps, and the hot gas forms a volume-filling cocoon. After smoothing on the tail scale, the simulated ratio converges to the observed one. Analytically, we derive that the Hα fraction is set by atomic physics, while the X-ray luminosity is determined by the hot-gas dwell time, which is much shorter than the cooling time at these temperatures and inversely proportional to pressure. This points to a connection with cooling at the low-temperature end of the cascade. The model explains the ratio’s order of unity and its insensitivity to pressure.
threads: Рентгеновская яркость галактических ветров всегда втрое превышает сияние водорода, хотя газ для рентгена в миллионы раз горячее. Это как если бы холодное молоко, влитое в эспрессо, неизменно светилось втрое ярче самого кофе — до тех пор, пока капли не растворятся. Такая универсальность превращает турбулентное смешение в измеримую величину и намекает на скрытую стандартную свечу.

title: How the Core Composition of Neutron Stars Affects the Axion Mass Bound
oneliner: Including exotic particles in neutron star interiors barely shifts the axion mass limit, making it a reliable beacon for dark matter searches.
description: Neutron stars are unique laboratories for testing physics beyond the Standard Model. Axions, lightweight dark matter candidates, can be born in their ultra-dense cores and speed up cooling. In a new study, scientists examined how the appearance of hyperons and delta resonances in the core affects pr
threads: Линза нейтронной звезды прошла тест на чистоту: экзотические гипероны не смазали фокус аксионного предела. Ограничение прочно как скала, а его точность бьёт в зону видимости IAXO. Обнаружив аксион, мы по его массе прочитаем рецепт самого экстремального вещества во Вселенной.

title: A Color Key to Unraveling the Ultraviolet Excess in Old Galaxies
oneliner: Hubble data confirm that the UV emission from elliptical galaxies is produced by second-generation stars from disrupted globular clusters.
description: Astronomers have found a way to link the long-standing mystery of the ultraviolet "hump" in the spectra of massive elliptical galaxies with the phenomenon of multiple stellar populations in globular clusters. Using images from the Hubble Space Telescope in four filters, they revealed radial color gr
threads: В центре старой эллиптической галактики, где всё давно угасло, прячется ультрафиолетовый горб. Это свет призраков. Когда-то они жили в шаровых скоплениях, но приливные жернова разорвали их дома, и звёзды, пропитанные гелием, разлетелись как светящиеся чернила. Теперь по градиентам цвета мы читаем эту драму — и, возможно, восстановим судьбы миллиардов пропавших солнц. Настоящая звёздная археология в ультрафиолете.

title: How Proton Beams Birth Waves and Take the Shape of a Hammer: Secrets of the Young Solar Wind
oneliner: Hybrid simulations reveal how the relaxation of proton beams via plasma instabilities leads to the formation of characteristic 'hammerhead' distributions in the young solar wind.
description: Fresh data from the Parker Solar Probe showed that in the young solar wind, drifting proton beams generate right-handed polarized electromagnetic waves. Using two-dimensional hybrid simulations, scientists studied the long-term evolution of such systems in two scenarios differing in drift velocity a
abstract: Based on observations by Parker Solar Probe in the young solar wind, revealing new properties of proton distribution functions and electromagnetic fluctuations, hybrid simulations of proton beam-plasma systems were performed. It is shown that beam relaxation, driven by instabilities of right-hand polarized waves, leads to the formation of hammerhead features in velocity distributions. The prominence of these features depends on the magnetic power of the generated waves, which is determined by the free energy of the system, quantitatively characterized by the plasma beta parameter and relative beam drift. The simulations reproduce the self-consistent evolution of instabilities and their nonlinear development, while linear theory identifies the nature of unstable modes and the conditions for their onset. Good agreement with quasi-linear theory confirms its effectiveness as a computationally inexpensive tool for analyzing wave-particle interactions.
threads: Протонный пучок, вырвавшись из короны, мог бы домчать до Земли за 20 минут — но плазма сама ставит себе тормоза. Электромагнитные волны, как порыв встречного ветра, обтачивают его в форму молотка. Этот механизм управляет рождением энергичных частиц и космической погодой — возможно, однажды мы предскажем его так же точно, как земную грозу.

title: Hunting for Axions in the Magnetospheres of Neutron Stars with FAST
oneliner: China’s FAST radio telescope has placed the tightest constraints yet on the interaction between axion dark matter and photons.
description: Axions are hypothetical particles that could solve the CP invariance problem in quantum chromodynamics and are prime candidates for cold dark matter. In the extreme magnetic fields of neutron stars, they can transform into narrow radio spectral lines, opening an astrophysical avenue for their detect
threads: Аксионы — частицы-невидимки, кандидаты на роль тёмной материи. В магнитных полях нейтронных звёзд они могут ненадолго становиться светом, оставляя узкий радиослед. FAST, самый чуткий в мире радиотелескоп, этот след искал. Результат: тишина. Но именно тишина дала самые строгие ограничения на свойства аксионов. Всё как в поиске внеземных цивилизаций: иногда отсутствие сигнала говорит громче любого обнаружения.

title: Stardust from Neutron Stars: How Kilonovae Unveil the Secrets of Heavy Elements
oneliner: Heavy elements born in neutron star mergers condense into dust, producing infrared emission that explains observations by the James Webb Space Telescope.
description: Astrophysicists have shown that in the ejecta of a kilonova — the optical afterglow of a neutron star merger — dust grains form from refractory elements (tungsten, osmium). These grains produce near-blackbody emission in the infrared, perfectly matching data obtained by the JWST telescope for the ki
abstract: Neutron star mergers are the main source of r-process elements, producing kilonovae — optical and infrared transients powered by radioactive heating. Observations of kilonovae AT2017gfo (associated with GW170817) and AT2023vfi (associated with GRB 230307A) have allowed measuring the mass of ejected r-process material and identifying heavy elements. However, late observations reveal strong infrared emission with temperatures below 1000 K, which is difficult to explain by atomic processes alone. This work demonstrates that conditions in kilonova ejecta are favorable for the formation of dust grains from refractory r-process elements, including Zr, W, and Os. Using kinetic calculations with reaction rate coefficients for tungsten, it is shown that dust formation is efficient, especially in slow ejecta, contrary to a previous study based on classical nucleation theory. Radiation transfer modeling that includes dust naturally explains the observed late infrared emission. The formation and abundance of r-process dust depend strongly on the mass, composition, and expansion velocity of the ejecta.
threads: Столкновение двух нейтронных звезд: за миг — Эвересты золота и платины. А после — из дыма пожара рождается металлическая пыль, светящаяся в инфракрасном. JWST поймал этот свет, и теперь мы можем взвешивать далёкие килоновые по их пылевому излучению. Золото вашего кольца, возможно, когда-то было частью такого облака.

title: FRB 20250613A: Millisecond Scattering Variations and the Mystery of Fast Radio Bursts
oneliner: The repeating fast radio burst FRB 20250613A exhibits abrupt scattering changes on millisecond timescales, pointing to extreme conditions near a neutron star.
description: FRB 20250613A is a new repeating fast radio burst localized in a dwarf galaxy at redshift z=0.0987. Using three radio telescopes (ASKAP, MeerKAT, Parkes), dozens of bursts were recorded, showing significant variations in scattering time (from 0.14 to 7.2 ms) and rotation measure (~300 rad/m²). Polar
abstract: We present an analysis of the repeating fast radio burst FRB 20250613A, localized in a low-metallicity dwarf galaxy at z=0.0987. Based on observations from ASKAP, MeerKAT, and Parkes, we studied scattering, polarization, and rotation measure.
